programme.title: Made: Perfect Boyfriend
programme.desc: Ben has no luck in love and is hoping to be MADE into the Perfect Boyfriend.

programme.title: My Super Sweet 16 NO
programme.desc: A white horse-drawn buggy (complete with prince) makes Cindy's Sweet 16 a Cinderella fairytale. That is, until her mom dances with her date.

programme.title: My Super Sweet 16 NO
programme.desc: A bikini photo shoot, a dress inspired by the movie The Princess Diaries II, and thirty dancers make up Janelle's Quinceanera. Let's hope her diva mother doesn't ruin it!

programme.title: My Super Sweet 16 NO
programme.desc: With the famous R&B singer Gerald Levert as her father, Carlysia gets what she wants. This includes a personal assistant and famous friends.

programme.title: My Super Sweet 16 NO
programme.desc: Cher lives in a castle in the small town of Palm Harbor, Florida. Her best friend and mother is a V.I.P. of Saks Fifth Avenue. Cher's Sweet 16 theme is a Mardi Gras masquerade ball because it'll give her party a festive feel.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1989 Ford Mustang
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper gjengen fra West Coast Customs Shondas Ford Mustang Convertible. Hun ruller i vei i et pimpet og helt trafikksikkert kjøretøy.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: Maxima Station Wagon
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet fra West Coast Customs Ezras Nissan Maxima Station Wagon. Han kjører av gårde i en mobil DJ-bås.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: Volkswagen Baja
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet fra West Coast Customs Krissys Volkswagen Baja Bug. Boblen fra 1969 ble konstruert med holdbarhet som mål. Men med sitt bøyde eksosrør og sine ødelagte dører, kan den virkelig beskrives som alt annet enn akkurat det.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1987 Honda CRX
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet fra West Coast Customs Brians Honda CRX. Det er den første bilen som får en splitter ny motor, ettersom den gamle dør innen Xzibit får den inn på verkstedet.

programme.title: Punk'd (MTV) NO: Lara Flynn Boyle, Ashanti, Omarion (from B2K)
programme.desc: Lara Flynn Boyle (The Practice) gets the anti-Hollywood treatment, Ashanti rides the tour bus from hell and Omarion (B2K, You Got Served) makes every father's nightmare come true.

programme.title: Punk'd (MTV) NO: Taye Diggs, Rachael Leigh Cook, Halle Berry
programme.desc: Rachael Leigh Cook (She's all That) blows the whistle on an old man beat-down, Halle Berry (Gothika, Catwoman) is denied entrance into her own movie premiere and Taye Diggs (Brown Sugar) gets a touchy-feely examination from Dr. Punk'd.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Miracle
programme.desc: An undercover agent is murdered while trying to intercept a huge heroin shipment in the Pacific Northwest and the IMF team is called to take over and put the dealer and his chief executioner out of business.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Encounter
programme.desc: Guest star Elizabeth Ashley plays the alcoholic wife of a crime syndicate leader whose involvement in an intimidation racket and the cold-blooded murder of an employee puts the IMF team on his trail.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Underwater
programme.desc: Stolen gems worth seventy-five million dollars scheduled to be fenced to an underworld figure suddenly disappear and the ship on which they were being transported is blown up at sea bringing the IMF team into the picture.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Invasion
programme.desc: Guest star Kevin McCarthy plays the role of a highly-placed Defense Department advisor who has murdered an Air Force official and sold vital top-secret material about America's nuclear defenses to foreign powers.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Blues
programme.desc: Barney poses as a prospective rock-music recording artist to get evidence linking an organized crime figurehead played by guest star William Windom to the sudden death of a beautiful recording star who was being blackmailed by the syndicate.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 506
programme.desc: En liten leiebolig i Vanløse og to små barn - ikke den beste kombinasjonen. Lisa og Erling drømmer om et stort hus med en stor hage. Tobias må jobbe hardt, da drømmene er mye større enn budsjettet.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark
programme.desc: Kristian drømmer om en diger garasje, og Nathja vil heller bli i Køge – kan Tobias oppfylle drømmene sine?

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark
programme.desc: Maja og Kenneth bor på Vestjylland og drømmer om å komme nærmere familien til Maja i Silkeborg. Men budsjettet deres krever at de går på akkord med beliggenheten og ser i de nærliggende små byene.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 603
programme.desc: I Ikast er Camilla og Marc sultne på et hus med plass til oppbevaring. Men når Tobias finner et stort hus til dem, mister de motet, da det nå er SÅ mange rom som må pusses opp...

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Falkenberg
programme.desc: Something is definitely happening in Falkenberg on the west coast of Sweden. Over the last couple of years it have become somewhat of a haven for foodies. Tareq is on a mission; taking him through a fertile landscape with vineyards and salmon fishing.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Estonia (Part 2)
programme.desc: Estonia has embarked on a journey greatly inspired by the nordic cuisine. Tareq explores the countryside of Estonia before he returns to the capital of Tallinn where he meets people that really love their traditional food.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Öland
programme.desc: Tareq bikes through the unique landscape of Öland, Sweden's second largest island located in the Baltic Sea. It is a place where the interaction between man and nature have created a diverse and rich farmland with an amazing amount of small producers.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Bornholm
programme.desc: Bornholm, the sunny bright green island with it’s own gastronomic tone is a true pioneer when it comes to local food at it’s finest quality. Tareq visit Denmark's first regional food culture house where they develop this unique flourishing cuisine.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Laponia
programme.desc: In the northern part of Sweden, you’ll find the stunning world heritage Laponia. Almost 10.000 square kilometres of nature reserves and national parks. Tareq visit the rich, unique culture of the sami in the vast impressive wilderness.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Malmö & Copenhagen
programme.desc: Tareq Taylor returns to his home turf to see what has happened and what the future might bring to the new nordic cuisine. He visits a local goat farmer and meets up with young enthusiastic chefs who takes this nordic legacy further.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Zealand
programme.desc: Tareq Taylor visits the South Coast of Denmark to make his own versions of open-faced sandwiches and smoked fish dishes.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Dalsland
programme.desc: Tareq Taylor puts on his hiking boots and explores the pilgrim trail of Dalsland in West Sweden. This episode will include outdoor cooking, foraging and beaver safari.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: The Family Is Rocked!
programme.desc: Geordiene er tilbake i tegnefilm, og får sjokk da et kjent fjes kommer tilbake. Bethan og Beau settes på prøve mens Chloes og Sams forhold holder på å bli bedre. Sophie må fatte et vanskelig valg.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Trouble in Paradise
programme.desc: Nathan besøker Sophie for å forstå hvorfor hun dro. Scott forteller gjengen at Anna arrangerer en singelkveld. Nathan Tasher i vei! Bethan ser seg ikke som singel, men det gjør Beau. Pinlig! Alt går skikkelig galt og Beau slår opp.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Beau & Bethan Back On!
programme.desc: Visse nykommere irriterer seg over at Nat er så overbeskyttende. Nathan danner en vennegruppe med de andre singeltons-ene, Tahlia & Alex. Sam & Chloe har det mye bedre etter en pinlig dag. Beau ordner opp med Bethan.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Cardiff Carnage!
programme.desc: Anna sier til gjengen at de skal dra til Cardiff. Beau er forventningsfull fordi alle kommer til å treffe broren hans, Harvey, som bor der. Men det gjør Bethan nervøs. Familien har det fint i Wales og Tahlia kliner med Harvey.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Dizzy Heights!
programme.desc: Geordierne har hjemmefest! Det er masse gøy og klining på gang. Beau foretrekker Bethan fremfor Abbie. Dette fører til en krangel mellom Chloe og Nathan - igjen! Scott syns lagånden bør styrkes så de rappellerer.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Fight Night!
programme.desc: Nathan arrangerer en overraskelsesfest for sin singelbestevenn, Tahila. Aaron ringer huset og inviterer familien som støtte på hans første MMA-kamp i Newcastle. Alle stiller opp for Aaron, og familien drar i svært godt humør.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Back into the Fold
programme.desc: Pauly og Vin har sine siste dater med Miami-jentene, mens Sam og Ron raskt havner i krangel. Jenni lager bråk mellom Pauly og Mike, og det blir en siste kveld full av drama i boblebadet.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Back to the Shore
programme.desc: Gjengen er tilbake for enda en vill sommer på Jersey-kysten! Angelina er borte, og Snooki har med seg vennen Deena. Spenningen mellom jentene etter Miami eksploderer den første kvelden.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: It's Gonna Be an Interesting Summer
programme.desc: Konflikten mellom Sammi og JWoww skaper spenning i huset. Ronnie og Sammi isolerer seg og går glipp av første familiemiddag. Men når Ronnie bestemmer seg for å henge med resten av gjengen, føler Sammi seg helt alene.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Where's the Beach
programme.desc: Sammi vil slutte fred med Snooki og Deena. JWoww møter eksen Roger. Snooki blir arrestert for drikking på offentlig sted.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Free Snooki
programme.desc: Snooki er deprimert etter å ha blitt arrestert, helt til hun treffer en ny gutt. Deena treffer Ronnies stuntmann. JWoww og Tom slår opp.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Drunk Punch Love
programme.desc: Ronnie og JWoww slutter fred, og Sammi slår til Ronnie. Vinny møter en jente med overlegen familie. Og Mike avslører Deenas lille hemmelighet.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Should We Just Break Up?
programme.desc: Ronnies drikking gir smertefulle bivirkninger. Snooki treffer en gutt som kanskje eller kanskje ikke er forlovet. Pauly slutter fred med en gammel fiende.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Though Lovers Be Lost...
programme.desc: Catherine reaches Vincent in the catacomb and rescues Vincent from his madness. However, as Vincent begins to recover, he realizes he has lost his bond with Catherine and is unable to sense when she is in danger.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Walk Slowly
programme.desc: Following Catherine's death on the rooftop, Vincent takes her back to her apartment and leaves her on her bed.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Nevermore
programme.desc: Vincent has begun his quest to find his son and makes his first move by revealing himself to Elliot.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Snow
programme.desc: The man who killed Catherine and took her baby sends an assassin to get Vincent. He manages to find the underground world and goes looking for him.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Beggar's Comet
programme.desc: Not wanting to put the Tunnel World in further danger, Vincent decides to leave the tunnels and with the death of Snow, Gabriel plots for Vincent's demise.

programme.title: JAG: Retrial
programme.desc: At the request of Seaman Saul Wainright (guest star William Sadler), who is serving a life sentence in a federal prison for stabbing a transsexual prostitute 20 years ago, Harm convinces Naval authorities to re-open the case.

programme.title: JAG: One Big Boat
programme.desc: When a Naval Academy sailing team gets caught in a squall and a team member drowns, Mac and Turner must determine if their driven commander willingly put his crew at risk.

programme.title: JAG: Fit For Duty
programme.desc: Harm and Mac find themselves on opposing sides when a Navy psychiatrist is charged with allegedly sending a marine diagnosed with combat stress back to battle too soon.

programme.title: JAG: Death At The Mosque
programme.desc: Vukovic is sent to Iraq to defend a Marine who was caught on tape killing a seemingly innocent Iraqi civilian.

programme.title: JAG: Dream Team
programme.desc: A sailor dies during a fight aboard a ship at sea; Bud discovers the explanation. Mattie wakes up and talks. The general announces a reorganization, orders, and a promotion.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Carol & Doug’s Story, Part 1
programme.desc: Julie catches love fever on the high seas and is thinking of marriage when the Pacific Princess is chartered for a dazzling star-studded wedding cruise that takes Capt. Stubing, his crew, and their guests on a beautiful scenic journey to Alaska.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Carol & Doug’s Story, Part 2
programme.desc: Wealthy Alaskan Buddy Bowers (Lorne Greene) recruits the services of the ship to take the wedding party from Vancouver, B.C., to Skagway, Alaska, for the nuptial ceremonies for his orphaned granddaughter, Carol (Lisa Hartman).

programme.title: The Love Boat: Going My Way / Dance With Me / Doc, Be Patient
programme.desc: When Doc (Bernie Kopell) gets the flu, he receives private treatment from a gorgeous doctor (Susan Sullivan) who keeps his fever up even when his temperature drops.

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Audit Couple / My Boyfriend's Back / The Scoop
programme.desc: A strict IRS auditor (Phyllis Diller) falls for Capt. Stubing (Gavin MacLeod) until she finds something in his file.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Crew Confessions / Haven't I Seen You? / The Reunion
programme.desc: Isaac (Ted Lange) has trouble on the high seas when the Love Boat crew discovers he has included some racy tales about them in his new novel.

programme.title: Happy Days: Casanova Cunningham
programme.desc: When Richie is caught two-timing Lori Beth for a pretty baton twirler, the Fonz has to step in and give Richie a few lessons in love.

programme.title: Happy Days: Richie Gets Framed
programme.desc: Richie and the Fonz visit a massage parlor to escape the pressures of a heated class presidency race, and Richie's opposition photographs the sheet-clad candidate with a pretty masseuse.

programme.title: Happy Days: Potsie Quits School
programme.desc: When troubles with his studies and an insulting professor cause Potsie to quit school, the Fonz comes up with an ingenious but offbeat plan to help his friend.

programme.title: Happy Days: Fonzie'S Funeral (Part 1)
programme.desc: In Part I, Fonzie is called to make emergency mechanical repairs on a stalled hearse and inadvertently discovers thousands of dollars in counterfeit money hidden in the coffin.

programme.title: Happy Days: Fonzie'S Funeral (Part 2)
programme.desc: In Part II, after Fonzie discovers thousands of dollars in counterfeit money in a hearse, the counterfeiters attempt to silence him.

programme.title: Happy Days: The Duel
programme.desc: The Fonz defends America's pride and saves Richie's hide when he matches blades with a French fencing champion, who not only insults the country, but makes nasty remarks about Joanie

programme.title: Happy Days: Fonzie Gets Shot
programme.desc: During a week-end at Potsie's uncle's hunting cabin, Fonzie is accidentally shot in the vicinity of his favorite jeans' back pocket.

programme.title: Happy Days: American Musical
programme.desc: Struggling to write a school essay on America's immigrant history, Chachi is inspired by Fonzie's colorful story told to the tune of an imagined melting pot melody.

programme.title: Happy Days: Grandma Nussbaum
programme.desc: Grandma Nussbaum teaches Fonzie and Chachi a lesson in growing old gracefully when they try to convince the feisty granny to move into a retirement home.

programme.title: MacGyver: Countdown
programme.desc: MacGyver matches wits with a brilliant extortionist who has placed a bomb on a ship in a deadly plot to gain several million dollars.

programme.title: MacGyver: Flames End
programme.desc: MacGyver endures one of his most horrifying experiences as he tries to stop a nuclear reactor from exploding and contaminating a community.

programme.title: MacGyver: The Enemy Within
programme.desc: MacGyver teams with a beautiful defector when he's asked to identify the double agent responsible for the deaths of three agents.

programme.title: MacGyver: Every Time She Smiles (Aka "Together Forever")
programme.desc: MacGyver meets a gorgeous woman in Bulgaria and falls prey to militiamen after the beauty slips some jewels into his pocket.

programme.title: MacGyver: To Be A Man
programme.desc: A seriously injured MacGyver finds himself in Soviet-dominated Afghanistan and befriended by a young Afghan boy.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Ta frem bestikket! Fire fremmede konkurrerer om penger og tittelen som den ultimate vert for middagsselskapet, følg med for en spicy konkurranse.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Matlock: The Celebrity
programme.desc: Ben Matlock flies out to Hollywood to defend a beautiful former actress, Catherine Welden, who formed a lucrative cosmetic business only to be accused of murdering an ex-lover who was blackmailing her.

programme.title: Matlock: The Witness Killings (Part 1)
programme.desc: When Matlock returns to his hometown, he ends up defending an accused murderer and becoming the town’s worst enemy.

programme.title: Matlock: The Witness Killings (Part 2)

programme.title: Matlock: The Strangler
programme.desc: Matlock’s personal accountant seeks representation by Ben when he is framed for the brutal murder of his employer.

programme.title: Matlock: The Nightmare

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Ummmm...Hello, 2021
programme.desc: Gjengen er sammen igjen, og forandringer henger i luften. Pauly D har en ny look, Vinny leter etter et nytt hjem, og da ryktene tar av på sosiale medier om Angelina og Chris' bryllup, skaffer Mike et nytt alter ego: Etterforskeren.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: The Party's Back
programme.desc: Bryllupsreisen kan være over for Angelina etter at Chris flytter ut. Men Mike har mye å feire da han har vært nykter i fem år. For å markere dagen, arrangerer romkameratene hans en parade til hans ære, og gjenkomsten til en viss romkamerat.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: The Streets are Talking
programme.desc: Snooki kommer tilbake for å feire Mikes fem år som nykter, og romkameratene begynner å planlegge sin neste store familieferie. Men alt går i stå da det dukker opp et ellevilt rykte om Angelina, ekteskapet hennes og fritert kylling.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Welcome to the Poconos
programme.desc: En fuktig brunsj med Snooki og Angelina går skeis da Snooki avslører "videobeviset" av Angelina i Old Bridge. Chris flytter hjem, og romkameratene dra til Poconos på vinterferie.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Mr. P
programme.desc: Jenni har en enorm kunngjøring. Men før feiringen kan begynne, må romkameratene håndtere elefanten i rommet som kaster en stor skygge over ferien i Poconos - filmklipp av Angelina og mysteriemannen hennes i Old Bridge, New Jersey.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Italian Ice
programme.desc: Vinny lider et ubeskrivelig tap, Angelina konfronterer Jenni om videoene, og romkameratene prøver seg på vintersport.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXXI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' prøver Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood å muntre opp folk som er 'Vinterdeppa', finner ut hva som skjer når du faller og opplever 'Fjes mot gjerde' og ødelegger perfekte øyeblikk med 'Triste forlovelsesopptak'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' lider Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood av 'Konsertforvirring', får smaken på 'Søvnsnacks' og flykter fra noen 'Hissige sammenstøt'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og medvert Lolo Wood det tøft når de flytter ut og blir 'Såre flyttefolk', møter noen nye medarbeidere som er 'Dumme på jobben' og finner ut at det er greit å gi opp i 'Vi kutter ut'

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' går Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Lolo Wood på trynet i gresset idet de 'Eter plen', blir veltrent og hårete med muskelforbundne 'Gymhunder' og går langt under null i 'Dypfryst moro'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' er Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood en fare for seg selv i 'Selvfelling', drar på gymet for å få seg en 'Boksesekktrøkk' og går langt i å utfordre høydeskrekken med 'Elleville høyder'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne 'Ridiculousness' har Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood med en spesiell gjest, Dee Snider, og møter rebeller i 'Tenker ikke å tåle det', opplever band som sliter i 'Kommer ikke til å slå gjennom' og blir nedstemt av spilt kaffe i 'Kaffetragedier'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' ser Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood på konsekvensene ved å overse skilt i 'Skiltblind', lærer om merkelige ting som er 'Teknisk sett sant' og finner ut hvordan sprø ting blir 'Sprøere og sprøere'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' ser Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood syklister få seg en overraskelse i 'Uventede sykkelhinder', møter ondskapsfulle katter som viser 'Kattevrede' før de tar en titt på folk som setter hodet fast i 'Skallefeller'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' prøver Rob, Steelo og Kristy Sarah seg på 'Kostymekatastrofer', kommer i kontakt med 'Etikettefjerne folk' og blir vitner til 'Nære på-overganger'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood se folk som snus opp ned av 'Påtvungne overslag', får seg en drink og to for mye med 'Pussa bestemødre' og finner ut grunnen til å unngå dansing med drinker i 'Ikke drikk og dans'.

programme.title: Andromeda: D Minus Zero
programme.desc: Andromeda-mannskapet lærer fremdeles hvordan de skal samarbeide ettersom de blir angrepet av restauratørene.

programme.title: Andromeda: Dobbel helix
programme.desc: Andromeda blir involvert i en strid mellom en enn planeten og en Nietzschean-koloni.

programme.title: Andromeda: Angel Dark, Demon Bright
programme.desc: En slipstream sender Andromeda tilbake i tid til like før Commonwealth faller. Mannskapet må gripe inn for å bevare historien

programme.title: Andromeda: Slipsene som blinder
programme.desc: Besvarelse av et nødanrop fører til at mannskapet henter Bekas bror, nå en Wayist, og hans venn.

programme.title: Andromeda: Bankene til Lethe
programme.desc: Et svart hull lar Dylan kommunisere med sin tidligere forlovede, 300 år tidligere.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Textbook Murder
programme.desc: Avis Banks and her unborn child were brutally murdered. The body was discovered by her fiancé, Keyon Pittman. When police learned that Pittman was having affairs with other women, he became the prime suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Filtered Out
programme.desc: In 2000, teenager Tara Munsey went missing after a work shift at a Virginia restaurant. Did she run away, or was she the victim of foul play?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Water Logged
programme.desc: In 1989, the dead bodies of Joan Rogers and her two teenage daughters were found floating in Tampa Bay.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Disappearance of Helle Crafts
programme.desc: In the series premiere of "Forensic Files", the longest-running true crime series in history, a Connecticut flight attendant goes missing. Police suspect her husband is guilty of murder, but can they prove it?

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Magic Bullet
programme.desc: A fifteen-year-old boy dies from a mysterious gunshot wound to the head while sitting in the lobby of his father's gun club. Ballistics, laser technology, made-to-scale models and the latest in forensic animation are used to find the cause.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The House That Roared
programme.desc: A woman disappears and her husband becomes the prime suspect — especially after police find a huge bloodstain on the carpet of their bedroom. When they spray the bedroom with Luminol, they discover it was awash with blood spatter.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Planted Evidence
programme.desc: One morning in a deserted area outside of Phoenix, a motorcyclist discovers the body of a young woman. She had been beaten, bound, strangled and possibly raped. Nearby plants tell investigators more about the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Wilson Murder
programme.desc: On the night of May 22, 1992, Betty Wilson returned home after a meeting and discovered her husband lying in a pool of blood. Jack Wilson had obviously been murdered — but how?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Insect Clues
programme.desc: Between 1985 and 1988, 18 people were choked, molested and left for dead in the remote mountains of California. The only witnesses were the insects — and they play an important role in solving the crimes and bringing the killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The List Murders
programme.desc: In 1971, John List left a note with the bodies of his mother, wife and three children in his mansion ballroom before disappearing completely. Detectives must solve the case, despite having only an outdated photograph of List.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Dirty Deed
programme.desc: In this classic episode of Forensic Files, the longest-running true crime series in television history, Eileen and Derrick Severs disappear from their home in a small village in Great Britain and police find evidence of foul play.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 18
programme.desc: This episode includes: Mental Daze, Motorcycle Mom, Beale's Cypher, Looking for Angeline and Gasparetto.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 19
programme.desc: This episode includes: Honeymoon Isle, Little Girl Lost, Bible Code, Update: Molester Cop, Bee Sting Healing and Surprise Sister.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 20
programme.desc: This episode includes: Born to Kill, Carnies, Children's Past Lives, Update: I.D. Swap, Sadd Fugitive and Nine Lives.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 21
programme.desc: This episode includes: Picture Taking Fugitive, John Burns, Deputy Death, Honky Tonk Woman, Update: Sharon's Search and Coma Healer.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 1
programme.desc: Unsolved Mysteries covers crimes, paranormal events, tales of lost love, UFO's, and unexplained history. This episode includes: Thumbs & Update, Marsh & Update, Conway, Honeymoon Bones and Dottie.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Brotherhood of Hate
programme.desc: In 1984, a tragic murder led agents into the frightening world of domestic terrorism. Law enforcement vowed to dismantle the violent faction that claimed responsibility.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The World Trade Center Bombing
programme.desc: Terrorist bombings are what happen in other countries. Not here in the United States. And yet, in 1993, it happened in New York City.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Mission
programme.desc: When a family was murdered in Arkansas, it seemed like an isolated event. But soon the crime was revealed to be part of an ever-widening circle of violence that defined a new age of domestic terrorism.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Melissa Brannen: Missing
programme.desc: In 1989, residents of a close-knit apartment community in Virginia gathered for a holiday celebration. For Tammy Brannen and five-year-old daughter Melissa, Christmas was always a special time. Then without warning, the little girl was gone.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Temple of Fear
programme.desc: In Miami, the discovery of a mutilated body sent investigators on the trail of a deadly cult. But agents found a wall of silence around the cult's members. Potential witnesses, terrified of reprisals, refused to talk.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Stolen Identity
programme.desc: When a theft is committed, something valuable is stolen. But when a criminal needs a new identity, theft becomes a matter of life and death.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Hidden Obsessions
programme.desc: In San Diego, California, a killer has left behind pieces of evidence. Detectives must sort through these small clues to prove murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Fatal Error
programme.desc: Accidental deaths, suicides, disappearances, and fires; they're an everyday part of an insurance investigator's life. But cases shouldn't be taken at face value. Forensics has become a tool for exposing insurance fraud.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Lasting Impressions
programme.desc: No matter how chaotic or how clean a crime scene appears to be, the culprit is bound to leave something telling behind. Occasionally, it's nothing more than a fingerprint or shoe tread. Sometimes that's all that's needed.

programme.title: The New Detectives: At Close Range
programme.desc: When a victim is gunned down at point-blank range, police often assume that a friend or acquaintance is to blame.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Lockdown: The Factory - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean and Bex investigate their deadliest and most haunted location: The Factory. Whatever lurks inside, has the power to shake an entire building. Dark forces are hiding within the location and expose themselves on tonight’s investigation!

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Lockdown: The Factory - Part 2
programme.desc: Sean and Bex return to the Factory with guest Kay. Their most haunted investigation ever continues as they uncover secrets of paranormal activity hauntings inside of the Factory. Something dark lurks inside!

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Who is There?
programme.desc: Could a cemetery be haunted? The team come head out to find out and contact restless souls that have been haunting the graveyard.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Lockdown: Haunted Grotto
programme.desc: Hidden secrets and a mischievous ghost are hiding in a haunted cave in Sefton Park. Ghost Dimension make contact with strange paranormal entities, that put on a full display of ghostly activity! Could this be the most haunted adventure yet?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Hotel of Horror
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension heads to Halewood and investigates the Wellington Hotel, believed to be a hive of paranormal activity. Will they uncover what is haunting this public house?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Lockdown: Family Full of Ghosts
programme.desc: The duo come into direct contact with spirits haunting the location. Even during the day there is no shortage of ghostly activity, on this lock down special paranormal Ghost Dimension investigation.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: The 1,000th Episode!
programme.desc: On the 1,000th episode, we'll bring you all of the crazy confessions, explosive meltdowns, chair throws, funny moments and the heartfelt stories that have made this show special!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve Saw Right Through You
programme.desc: Today on Steve Wilkos, Maurice wants to prove to his girlfriend that he's faithful. Plus Chuanhtee says fed up with Ladi's cheating accusations! Watch as the truth is revealed!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Have Two Husbands
programme.desc: Jessica married Gian after a five-month relationship. With a baby on the way, everything seems to be going great for the couple, except Jessica is married to another man, Michael!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: An Explosive DNA Story
programme.desc: Teneal and Richard are telling different tales, each alleging the other is unfit to parent! The truth will come down to a lie detector test, and the results will be shocking!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve, I Can't Face The Truth.
programme.desc: Today Danny is finally ready to face the missing man in his life and get answers to lifelong questions. Steven offers a number of excuses for not seeing his son, but can he redeem himself?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Did You Murder My Daughter?
programme.desc: Two years ago, Latisha and her boyfriend were found shot to death in their car. Latisha’s mother Nancy believes her ex-husband Kenneth was involved. Who is responsible for their deaths?

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Shot Through the Heart
programme.desc: 15yr old Chuck returns home from school to find his mother, Betty Limbrick, shot dead on the floor. Evidence points to a robbery gone wrong, but Kenda uncovers a plot almost too shocking to believe.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Blood Sisters
programme.desc: The bullet-ridden bodies of two sisters are found in a suburban house that’s littered with mysterious clues. Joe Kenda learns that the two unassuming young mothers shared an explosive secret.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Victim Zero
programme.desc: A brawl erupts at a local bar ends with the shooting death of a army solider. To unravel the murder, Lt. Joe Kenda most infiltrate a revered military institution, and expose a dangerous vendetta.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: A Killer Always Rings Twice
programme.desc: When 22 year-old Micki Filmore is found raped and murder in her apartment, detective Kenda focuses his investigation on her activities the previous night.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: I Now Pronounce You Dead
programme.desc: Mother of 3 Dianne Hood is shot to death by a masked gunman on her way home from a Lupus support meeting. Joe Kenda uncovers a sordid web of lust and greed, revealing a killer no one ever expected.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Butcher Baker: Terror in the Wilderness (Part 1)
programme.desc: The Butcher Baker was one of the most prolific serial killers in Alaska’s history. For over a decade, he kidnapped young women and brought them into the wilderness where he stalked them like prey.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Butcher Baker: The Girls Who Got Away (Part 2)
programme.desc: The Butcher Baker was one of the most prolific serial killers in Alaska’s history. For over a decade, he kidnapped young women and brought them into the wilderness where he stalked them like prey.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: Motor vehicle fatalities account for many of the cases that come into the morgue. Dr. G offers expertise as to how to get behind the wheel and not wind up on a steel table.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: When Dr. G receives Lea Conrad's body, she suspects the woman may have died from an antihistamine overdose. Then, Dr. G learns that Lea was being treated for lupus.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: An elderly woman is driving when she’s overcome with shooting pains and crashes her car. She’s rushed to the hospital, but the doctors find nothing wrong. Can Dr. G find the cause of death?

programme.title: My Haunted House: Don't Go Upstairs and Swerve
programme.desc: Two brothers discover a horrifying secret when they inherit a relative's home. A school teacher struggles to learn the identity of the child-like spirit that's stalking her.

programme.title: My Haunted House: Paralyzed and The Baby Thief
programme.desc: A man suffering from sleep paralysis captures evidence that something is entering his room. A pregnant woman fears something is trying to harm her unborn child.

programme.title: My Haunted House: The Innkeeper and Quarantine
programme.desc: A boy tells his babysitter that a man called "The Keeper" visits his room in the night. A recovering addict realizes the visions he's seeing at a remote cabin are not hallucinations.

programme.title: My Ghost Story: A Haunted House
programme.desc: A man and his girlfriend dream of owning their own "haunted attraction," but end up owning an actual haunted house; and the ghostly voice of a passenger who died in a plane crash is heard in a chilling recording.

programme.title: My Ghost Story: The Demon in the Mist
programme.desc: A phantom breaches security at a South Carolina government building. A pipe-smoking ghost haunts a lighthouse. A son killed in a car accident makes his presence known to his grieving mother. A demon attacks guests at a Texas house.

programme.title: My Ghost Story: The Hand of Death
programme.desc: A cemetery that's home to 80,000 dead souls becomes a "ghost magnet"; a family discovers that their new home is filled with the sounds of strange footsteps and whispered conversations; and more.

programme.title: Andromeda: Immaculate Perception
programme.desc: Genitter angriper Tyrs kone og koloni.

programme.title: Andromeda: Tunnel ved enden av lyset
programme.desc: Med femti partier ombord er Dylan vert for signeringen av New Commonwealth-charteret, men oppdager snart at det er inntrengere som har til hensikt å stoppe signeringen.

programme.title: Mutant X: One Step Closer
programme.desc: Teamet kjemper for å inneholde Brennans mutante krefter uten kontroll, når han setter oppdraget for å beskytte en senators datter i fare.

programme.title: Mutant X: Reality Check
programme.desc: Shalimar kommer i trøbbel når teamet møter en mutant fra den kalde krigen, med evnen til å endre virkeligheten og ødelegge folks sinn.

programme.title: Mutant X: Reawakening
programme.desc: Teamet hjelper mannskapet til en havforskningsstasjon truet av en forhistorisk skapning som tidligere var antatt å være utryddet.

programme.title: Mutant X: Lest He Become
programme.desc: Shalimar godtar motvillig å kontakte sin fremmede far når teamet får vite at selskapet hans er involvert i gentesting og manipulering.

programme.title: On the Case: Evil Repeats Itself
programme.desc: Beautiful teenager Mary Jayne Jones is found murdered in a desolate farmhouse while its owner is out of town.

programme.title: On the Case: Murder in Store
programme.desc: In San Antonio, Texas, video game store manager Amber Belken is murdered in an apparent robbery gone wrong. On further investigation, however, detectives are troubled by the evidence.

programme.title: On the Case: Half Way Home
programme.desc: The discovery of a woman's body inside an abandoned trailer leads to a 28-year search for the person responsible for her beating death.

programme.title: On the Case: Broken Trust
programme.desc: When a young girl vanishes on the way home from school, her family and police are sent on a tormenting search for answers.

programme.title: On the Case: Hidden by Lies
programme.desc: After a college student is found stabbed to death in her off-campus apartment, it may take a second murder to solve her case.

programme.title: On the Case: Final Words
programme.desc: A devoted mother returns home from work and finds her 17-year-old daughter has been murdered. Was her killer the mysterious boyfriend she had written about in her journal?

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Target Practice
programme.desc: Joe and Mikey head to England to bring home a new plane. Devan does target-practice in the DC-4.James builds a Buffalo-style soapbox racer.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Air Show
programme.desc: Joe flies with the Snowbirds during the Hamilton air show and later teaches Mikey to fly. A surprise departure shakes up Buffalo.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Five Seasons
programme.desc: Ice Pilots NWT celebrates a milestone with a look back at the last five years, a peek behind the camera and reflections from the Buffalo crew.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: A Ball O'Snags
programme.desc: An engine fire and series of mechanical gremlins has Buffalo scrambling to make its Christmas deliveries. Newest rampie Prefkar Mony struggles with life in the North.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Ice Storm
programme.desc: Buffalo's Electra aircraft is hammered by rough winds up the Mackenzie Valley. In Hay River, a rookie crew faces the worst ice storm in years and one rampie has a tough go trying to fit in at Buffalo.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Old Dogs
programme.desc: Engine trouble plagues Buffalo's newest Electra, ZFE, and a standoff between Joe and Transport Canada threatens to close the airline. At the same time, Joe faces a tough decision about his old dog Sophie.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Anne Hathaway, "The Daily Show’s” Dulce Sloan
programme.desc: Week-long Halloween celebration w/ "The Witches" star Anne Hathaway. "The Daily Show's" Dulce Sloan introduces some single men & their furry sidekicks! Drew goes down to the basement of the CBS Studios with ghosthunter Steve Gonsalves to hunt for ghosts!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Drew’s Halloween Show! "Emily in Paris" Star Ashley Park
programme.desc: Drew’s Halloween show! "Emily in Paris's" Ashley Park stops by. Plus, celebrations expert Darcy Miller shares tips to repurpose leftover Halloween candy. Drew's "Stans for Stains: Halloween Edition." A curated list of Drew's favorites in "The Weekender."

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Jessica Capshaw, Rage Baking
programme.desc: Netflix’s "Holidate" star Jessica Capshaw stops by to chat. Then, Drew enlists finance expert Farnoosh Torabi and psychologist Dr. Aliza Pressman who share tips on how to talk to your kids about money. Drew and Ross Matthews try-out "Rage Baking."

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Actress Annaleigh Ashford, Olympic Snowboarder Jamie Anderson
programme.desc: Actress Annaleigh Ashford chats. Drew has a big surprise for nurse Gina Goodwin, who cooks and delivers hundreds of meals every Thanksgiving. Olympic snowboarder Jamie Anderson shares her winter skin routine. Drew reads letters in "Dear Drew."

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Youtube Star David Dobrik, Comedian Fortune Feimster, Beauty Backgrounder
programme.desc: David Dobrik on amassing over 15 million YouTube subscribers and the Vlog Squad. Comedian Fortune Feimster stops by. in Beauty Backgrounder, Drew does a deep-dive into the history of iconic beauty looks and shares tips for perfecting the timeless look.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Comedian Gabriel Iglesias, "Friendsgiving" Cast
programme.desc: Host of Nickelodeon’s new animal talent show "Unleashed" comedian Gabriel Iglesias shares with Drew one of his favorite acts. Cast of the new film "Friendsgiving" including Malin Akerman, Kat Dennings, Aisha Tyler and Chelsea Peretti stop by to chat.

programme.title: Cops: Crawling to Vegas
programme.desc: A driver leads police on a slow speed chase towards Las Vegas. Three people are suspected of using contraband. A multi-neighbor dispute devolves into a fight involving guns and bats.

programme.title: Cops: First Do No Harm
programme.desc: A suicidal man tries to taunt police into shooting him. Undercover officers bust up an illegal operation at a pain management clinic. A woman claims she's just a bystander to a motorcycle hit and run.

programme.title: Cops: Safe Cracking
programme.desc: A man stages a sit-in in his car in an attempt to stop it from being towed. A homeowner denies that he's selling drugs despite the large amount of evidence found in his home.

programme.title: Cops: High Jump Fail
programme.desc: A family with kids is taken on a high speed car chase. An intoxicated suspect tries to jump a fence while protesting that he's not trying to run away.

programme.title: Cops: Bumming a Smoke
programme.desc: A runaway motorcycle tries to elude officers by driving on a rough road. An argument over a cigarette turns ugly. Kids throw rocks from an overpass at the wrong car.

programme.title: Cops: Neighborhood Rage
programme.desc: A suspect ditches his bike when stopped and tries to outrun the police. Neighbors fight out a road rage incident with rocks and a baseball bat.

programme.title: Cops: My Bills Won't Wait
programme.desc: A suspect calls the police and states that he wants to kill himself and any officer who tries to help him. None of the three occupants of a stopped car will admit to ownership of a bag of drugs.

programme.title: Cops: Family Therapy
programme.desc: Officers are flagged down and alerted to a group of armed men assaulting people at a nearby home. A fight between a father and his adult son takes a dark turn.

programme.title: Cops: Spiked but Still Moving
programme.desc: A suspect refuses to stop his vehicle even after the officers spike his tires. A dispute over money results in a pregnant woman being attacked.

programme.title: Cops: Nightvision
programme.desc: A man on a late-night bike ride is stopped by officers for not having a headlamp. A suspect in a domestic dispute admits to hitting a woman.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Stabed In Her Bed: The Maureen Jaquier Case
programme.desc: On February 27, 2015, in Toulouse, the parents of 19-year-old Maureen Jacquier discover their daughter stabbed several times in her bed.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Shot At Point-Blank: The Aurelie Barbot Affair
programme.desc: On December 20, 2012, in Val d'Izé (Ille-et-Vilaine), Aurélie Barbot, 29, was killed on her doorstep with a bullet to the head.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Crime Scene Solvers: Honeymoon Killers (Van Beers Case)
programme.desc: Marc Van Beers, a 36-year old Brussels tax lawyer, dies in a road accident while on honeymoon. His wife Aurore is unharmed by the accident.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Laurence Dromard Case
programme.desc: Sylvain Dromard finds the body of his wife Laurence lying in a pool of blood in the kitchen. The crime was particularly violent and the theory of a burglary that went wrong is soon excluded. But investigators don't understand who could want her dead.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Two Young Women Massacred: The Leconte Affair
programme.desc: On July 8, 2002, near Amiens, a farmer discovers the lifeless body of a young woman, Patricia Leclercq, on his field.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 101
programme.desc: Anne Elisabeth Hagen forsvinner sporløst fra sitt hjem høsten 2018. På en rød stol finner ektemann og milliardær, Tom Hagen et trusselbrev og krav om løsepenger.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker
programme.desc: Den 15. mai 2018 ble politiet i Örebro varslet om at Lena Wesström, en trebarnsmor, var forsvunnet fra hjemmet sitt. Et vitne hevder å ha hørt hjerteskjærende skrik fra en kvinne samme natt som Lena forsvant.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 202
programme.desc: Tidlig en søndag morgen i 2004 er den 22 år gamle sykepleierstudenten Anne Slåtten på vei til jobb, men hun dukker aldri opp. Etter et døgn blir hun funnet drept i. Hvem kan ha tatt livet av den omsorgsfulle jenta?

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 501
programme.desc: Gjenopptakelseskommisjonen har siden 2018 vurdert om Norges mest kjente drapssak skal etterforskes på ny. Skal det endelig lykkes Per og Veronica Orderud å få gjenopptatt saken?

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 605
programme.desc: Den 12. juni 2017 blir et eldre par funnet brutalt drept på deres gård utenfor Mantorp. Viktige brikker i puslespillet i jakten på morderen viser seg å være teiprester, så vel som usedvanlig store skoavtrykk.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 302
programme.desc: I september 2003 blir en gutt seksuelt misbrukt av en mann i trappeoppgangen der han bor. Politiet starter en intens jakt på mannens identitet for å få stoppet ham. Samtidig kommer det stadig inn nye meldinger om overgrep.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Her Pilgrim Soul/I of Newton

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Shatterday/A Little Peace and Quiet
programme.desc: A man named Peter Jay Novins accidentally dials his home phone number, and it's answered by Peter Jay Novins/A harried housewife finds a medallion that gives her the power to freeze time

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Where is Everybody?

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: One for the Angels
programme.desc: A street salesman cleverly eludes Death. But if he lives, a little girl must die in his place.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Mr. Denton on Doomsday
programme.desc: A has-been, drunk gunslinger finds his fast-draw abilities magically restored.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Sixteen-Millimeter Shrine

programme.desc: A young boy cares for his grandmother, confronting fears to step up/A screenwriter with writer's block is haunted by unseen creatures/Actors in a radio play realize their words manifest reality.

programme.desc: The X-1 jet breaks the sound barrier; the X-43 Scramjet flies at Mach 7; U-2 and SR-71 Cold War spy planes; flying Wing bombers; the new F/A Raptor.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Scientists and technicians use cutting-edge forensic technology to unearth identities of perpetrators at the FBI's crime lab at Quantico.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Fertilizer--without it two thirds of the world would starve. It makes our lawns grow greener and our crops grow taller; take a tour of the places where the essential nutrients that feed the soil are harnessed.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Who could imagine life without our "man-made weather"? On cold winter nights and hot summer days, we are forever grateful to the visionaries who took two basic elements--fire and ice--and turned them into true modern marvels.

programme.title: Modern Marvels

programme.title: World War II in HD Colour: The Gathering Storm
programme.desc: The activities of nations after World War I that lead to World War II.

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: Hitler's Killer Police
programme.desc: In Ukraine and Lithuania, Nazi invaders were welcomed as liberators. In Lithuania, Antanas Gecas led a militia that executed hundreds of Jews. Ukrainian nationalists participated in pogroms slaughtering 34,000 Jews in two days.

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: The Gatling Gun, designed to change 19th-century battlefields, now reigns supreme in the skies as a high-speed offensive weapon. With a 150-year legacy of havoc it continues to be a formidable force.

programme.title: Auschwitz: The Nazis and the Final Solution: Corruption
programme.desc: I 1943 er korrupsjonen løpsk på Auschwitz-Birkenau. Leiren får også en ny inntektskilde – klær og verdifulle eiendeler tatt fra jøder som kommer for å bli gasset.

programme.title: WWII's The Great Escapes: The Freedom Trails: Italy: Operation Galia
programme.desc: Monty’s journey sees him follow the path 33 SAS soldiers took after they were parachuted behind enemy lines to attack the enemy and create chaos to draw Nazi-fascist forces away from the front line.

programme.title: World War II in HD Colour: Britain at Bay
programme.desc: Germany makes critical errors during the bombing of Britain.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: iCarly: Overvåket
programme.desc: Etter å ha sett et klipp på iCarly der en mann selger illegale piratkopivideoer, bestemmer to detektiver seg for å bruke Carly og Spencers loft for overvåking.

programme.title: iCarly: Skolebytte
programme.desc: Carly får vite at hun får mulighet til å få et fullt stipend til en privat eliteskole pga nettshowet sitt. Skolen er Briarwood. Carly er i sterk tvil, men Sam og Freddie vet de må få henne til å gå for det.

programme.title: iCarly: Fektedrama
programme.desc: Freddie trenger litt guttetid, så han slår seg sammen med Spencer for å dra og fekte. Freddie er et naturtalent, men ting blir innviklet når Spencer får ham med i en kamp mot den utrolige Doug Toder.

programme.title: iCarly: Vinn en date
programme.desc: Når vennen deres Gibby er for sjenert for å be ut jenta han liker, bestemmer gjengen seg for å gjøre ham og hans flamme til deltagere i et "iWin A Date" innslag på nettvideoshowet deres

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg så han først
programme.desc: Når Carly og Sam viser interesse for den samme fyren, lover de at han ikke skal komme imellom dem. Men det er vanskelig, og når de slåss om hans oppmerksomhet, blir vennskapet deres satt på prøve.

programme.title: iCarly: Pack rat
programme.desc: Carly må trå til når Spencer blir avhengig av et videospil. Sam lurer Freddie til å tro at han blir forfulgt av uhell når han nekter å sende et kjedebrev videre.

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg skylder deg en
programme.desc: Sam blir fornærmet når Freddie beskylder henne for ikke å betale ham og Carly noen av de pengene tilbake som hun konstant låner. Sam prøver iherdig å betale dem tilbake - hun finner seg en ordentlig jobb.

programme.title: iCarly: Hubert Lewbert
programme.desc: En "Lur Lewbert"-sketsj går helt galt og skader Carlys irriterende portvakt. Gjengen pleier ham inntil Freddies mor tar over. Men når kærligheten begynner å blomstre, må de sette en stopper for det.

programme.title: iCarly: Pie
programme.desc: Når Carly, Sam og Spencer tar med Freddie til deres yndlingskonditori, finner de ut at eieren er død. Men enda verre er det at oppskriftene hans kanskje er gått tapt for alltid.

programme.title: iCarly: Jul
programme.desc: I et forsøk på å pifte opp julen med et utradisjonelt tre, kommer Spencer til å sette fyr på alle Carlys gaver. Fortvilet ønsker hun seg at hun hadde en normal bror.

programme.title: iCarly: Kysset
programme.desc: Sam overhører Freddie fortelle Carly at han aldri har kysset en jente, og avslører hemmeligheten hans på netshowet. Gibby og Carly trener Spencer til utttaket for det lokale, profesjonelle fotballaget.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Norman's Conquest
programme.desc: Diane og Sam prøver å få Coach vekk fra ryggen ved å arrangere en dobbeldate.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Old Flames
programme.desc: Cliff stikker når en kunde vil begynne å slåss.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Personal Business
programme.desc: Coach bringer lykke til Cheers når han kjøper en antikk vekt.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Power Play
programme.desc: Diane forbyr Sam å gå på en årlig skitur med kompisene.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Snow Job
programme.desc: Coach blir såret når han får vite at hans avdøde venn en gang forsøkte seg på kona hans.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Sumner's Return
programme.desc: Norm prøver å bevise sin mannlighet når hans nye klient gjør fremskritt.

programme.title: Cheers NO: They Called Me Mayday
programme.desc: Sam ønsker fred, og ansetter en strålende kunstner til å male Diane.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Where There's a Will
programme.desc: Diane forsvarer forholdet til Sam til en baktalende kunstner.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Rebound: Part 1
programme.desc: I kjølvannet av den eksplosive separasjonen, har Sam falt av vognen og gått tilbake til playboy-livet, mens Diane nettopp har kommet tilbake fra en selvpålagt hvile på Golden Brook Sanitarium.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Work is Death (aka Burger World) / Werewolves of Highland / Tech Support
programme.desc: After the Manager explains that Workers Compensation pays you for getting injured on the job, Butt-head sets out to injure Beavis / A Vampire craze hits the high school / Beavis and Butt-Head misinterpret what it means to ask a man for his daughter's hand

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Killing Time / Dude, a Reward
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head's worst fears are realized when they have to kill two hours, until something good comes on TV. / Images of Beavis and Butt-head grace the walls of a photo gallery after they find a lost camera and put it to creative use.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Teen Talk / vs.the Vending Machine
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head join Captain Dick Jackman on his Sunday morning program, "rapping" about their problems. / The vending machine wins.

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Fluktrommet/Den viktige
programme.desc: Beavis og Butt-Head prøver å løse Fluktromgåten, bare for å bli fanget på badet. / Beavis møter sin største helt - Ild.

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Snille Butt-Head/ Hjemmehjelp
programme.desc: Butt-Head får medisin for sin aggresjon mot Beavis og blir litt for snill./ Middelaldrende Beavis og Butt-Head går tom for ølpenger, så Beavis må finne seg en jobb.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Shopping cart / Die Fly, Die! / Drinking Butt-ies
programme.desc: Our duo find out that accidents can lead to money / Beavis and Butt-Head get annoyed at a fly / After a beating by Todd, they become best friends over beer

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Virtuelt vannvidd / Utestengt
programme.desc: Beavis og Butt-Head tar på seg solbriller og tror de er virtual reality-briller./ Beavis og Butt-Head blir låst ute av huset og ødelegger det når de prøver å komme seg inn.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Radio Sweethearts / The Great Cornholio
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head win a radio contest and become disc jockeys for a day. / During a sugar rush, Beavis' alter ego appears. He reeks havoc at Highland High looking for "teepee for his bunghole."

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Murder Site / Sexual Harassment
programme.desc: Beavis can't take Butt-head's verbal abuse anymore, and snaps while they're checking out the site of a local murder. / Beavis and Butt-head sue Kimberly for sexual harassment, since she's giving them wood.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Ding-Dong-Ditch / Head lice / Nothing happening
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-Head have trouble with a prank / The duo try to cure their scratchy heads / A quiet day in Highland, Texas

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Love is a Many Complicated Thing
programme.desc: Sabrina agrees to a double date on Valentine's Day with Josh and Morgan, but by the end of the date she finds herself in the middle of her friends' break up.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sabrina the Muse
programme.desc: Sabrina is flattered when her new boyfriend writes music about his feelings for her, but the pressure to inspire him as his muse becomes a one-sided relationship.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Beach Blanket Bizarro
programme.desc: Sabrina’s wild visions of her first college spring break turn squeaky-clean when her aunts ask 60’s teen idol Frankie Avalon to put a spell on the trip. This sends Sabrina and her friends into a world straight out of a 60’s beach movie.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Witchright Hall
programme.desc: When Sabrina’s trouble-making teenage cousin Amanda is sent to live with Hilda and Zelda, they count on Sabrina to convince the headmaster and school director of Witchright Hall to accept Amanda.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sabrina the Activist
programme.desc: Sabrina, who is now in low spirits over her heavy course load and recent break up, decides to put her energy into something positive: leading a protest to save an historical building from demolition.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Do You See What I See?
programme.desc: Sabrina feels responsible when Miles considers giving up his paranormal research to settle in his father’s accounting business after no one believes the otherworldly phenomena he sees at the Spellman home.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sabrina’s Got Spirit
programme.desc: Sabrina tries to throw off Miles and the specialist he has hired to uncover paranormal activity in the house, but Sabrina herself discovers a ghost in the ceiling.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Finally!
programme.desc: Romance brews between Sabrina and Josh when they turn the coffeehouse into a single's night featuring entertainment by the band Eden's Crush.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The Really Big Season Opener
programme.desc: Miles decides to make a student film in his favorite genre, horror, and enlists Sabrina as the producer of his film.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sabrina’s Date with Destiny
programme.desc: Sabrina and her friends return to school and a lot of excitement after summer break.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Starting Over
programme.desc: Alex is on the rebound when Ellen leaves for Paris.

programme.title: Fem i familien: The Freshman and the Senior
programme.desc: Mallory gets paired with a senior citizen for a class project.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Beauty and the Bank
programme.desc: Alex jeopardizes his career at a bank when he falls for his boss.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Paper Lion
programme.desc: Alex faces a moral dilemma while assisting his professor on a research project.

programme.title: Fem i familien: My Brother's Keeper
programme.desc: Skippy is the victim of a cruel fraternity prank when Alex intervenes.

programme.title: Fem i familien: O'Brother: Part 1
programme.desc: The Keatons are devastated when Uncle Rob announces he’s getting a divorce.

programme.title: Fem i familien: O'Brother: Part 2
programme.desc: The Keatons hear the other side of the story about Uncle Rob’s separation.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Battle of the Sexes: Part 1
programme.desc: The Keatons have their own battle of the sexes.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Battle of the Sexes: Part 2
programme.desc: The Keatons reminisce about their relationships gone awry.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Slap-Ass
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer at kara har en dårlig Skype-forbindelse, en Django Unchained-slavekamp og en baseballspiller som klasker for mange rumper.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Das Negroes
programme.desc: Jordan og Keegan prøver å gjemme seg for en negerjaktende nazist. Andre sketsjer inkluderer to slaver som sliter med å bli solgt, et par kriminelle som kommer i knipe før et stort kupp.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Meagan's Fight
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer at Meagan vender tilbake, Jordan prøver å se kul ut på en strippeklubb og opptrer med et funk-show.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Aerobics Meltdown
programme.desc: Stan Lee har noen nye superhelter, og en gatesmart fyr mister sin street cred når han opplever en hjernefrysning. Og sist, men ikke minst, utvikler en mann en komplisert minnesanordning for å huske hvor han har parkert.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Obama College Years
programme.desc: Jordan og Keegan befinner seg plutselig i en gjenoppføring av Borgerkrigen, Jesus møter en farlig hallik, og vi får en god titt på president Barack Obama de første årene på college.

programme.title: Key & Peele: MMMMMM
programme.desc: Jordan og Keegan opptrer foran et oppstemt publikum, en trafikkreporter blir utsatt for turbulens i et helikopter og halvdelen av en R&B duo avslører sine sanne følelser for sin partner under en opptreden.

programme.title: Key & Peele: The Power of Wings
programme.desc: Inkluderer sketsjer der Keegan og Jordan avlytter hvite kvinner som elsker svarte menn, Wendell lager en musikkvideo og Kareem og Jahar går på treningssenteret.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Soul Food
programme.desc: Jordan og Keegan diskuterer hvem som er mest svart, og å være den eneste svarte på en fest. Sketsjer inkluderer Tea Party som oppdager et nytt håp, hærens ververe som tenker annerledes, og Bobby McFerrin som duellerer mot Michael Winslow.

programme.title: Key & Peele: The 420 Special
programme.desc: Neil deGrasse Tyson slapper av hjemme, Keegan må bevare fatningen under et jobbintervju, en skredder får en klient med luft i magen, parkeringsvaktene diskuterer 'Game of Thrones' og en telefonselger prøver en ny strategi.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Terrorist Meeting
programme.desc: En gangster prøver desperat å bevise at han er gal, terrorister møtes for å planlegge sitt neste trekk og en sjalu storebror gjør familiemiddagen pinlig.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Bone Thugs And Homeless
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer en hund som plager en nyhetsreporter og Harriet Tubman som løper fritt omkring.

programme.title: Broad City: Rat Pack
programme.desc: Etter å ha mottatt en heftig regning for skadedyrsbekjempelse, holder Jaime og Ilana en fest for å dekke kostnadene. I mellomtiden drar Abbi ut på tokt for å møte nye mennesker.

programme.title: Broad City: 2016
programme.desc: Ilana finner sitt nye kall, og Abbi må innom det mest fryktede sted i verden: biltilsynet.

programme.title: Broad City: Philadelphia
programme.desc: Abbi og Ilana drar til Philly for å besøke Abbis barndomshjem . Når Abbi innser at hun gjorde en stor tabbe på videregående, drar hun og Ilana på forsoningsoppdrag.

programme.title: Broad City: B&B-NYC
programme.desc: Abbi og Ilana legger ut leilighetene sine på B & B-NYC for å tjene litt ekstra penger.

programme.title: Broad City: Burning Bridges
programme.desc: Ilanas foreldre kommer til byen for deres 30-årsjubileum, men Abbi og Ilana syns det er vanskelig å feire når de begge opplever samlivsproblemer.

programme.title: Broad City: Getting There
programme.desc: Abbi og Ilana skal ut på tur, men bare det å komme seg til flyplassen viser seg å være mye vanskeligere enn forventet.

programme.title: Broad City: Jews on a Plane
programme.desc: Abbi får mensen under en flytur, så hun og Ilana går drastisk til verks for å finne en tampong.

programme.title: Broad City: Sliding Doors
programme.desc: En vårdag i 2011 møtes Abbi og Ilana for første gang.

programme.title: Broad City: Twaining Day
programme.desc: Abbis korte tilbakekomst til Soulstice blir interessant når hun får opplæringsmuligheten som hun alltid har drømt om. I mellomtiden får Ilana en ny jobb på en restaurant.

programme.title: Broad City: Just the Tips
programme.desc: Ilana går amok med pengene hun tjente på servitørjobben, og Abbis nye forhold gjør at det lyser av henne. På fest senere den kvelden, møter jentene på en gammel venn.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Dangle's Wedding
programme.desc: Dangle preps for his wedding after his ex-wife's ex-husband proposes, and Wiegel goes into labor while stuck in cake.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Jumping the Shark
programme.desc: Garcia breaks up Dangle's wedding in more ways than one, and Terry the prostitute finds someone to love.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Tommy Hawk
programme.desc: Tommy Hawk, bounty hunter, and reality TV star runs afoul of the Reno Sheriff's Department.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Kevlar for Her
programme.desc: The department's new bulletproof vests for women have an unexpected side effect: super knockers.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Mayor Hernandez
programme.desc: Reno's Mayor Hernandez asks the Sheriff's Department for help, and the deputies must decide whether to uphold the law or uphold local government.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Coconut Nut Clusters
programme.desc: The deputies raise money selling delicious Coconut Nut Clusters door-to-door.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Back in Black
programme.desc: Dangle reconnects with his family after his estranged father passes away.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Undercover at Burger Cousin
programme.desc: Rick the Burger Cousin manager is a cruel taskmaster when deputies go undercover flipping burgers.

programme.title: RENO 911!: The Wall
programme.desc: Garcia and Junior help build a wall to keep Mexicans from crossing into America illegally.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Death of a Pickle-Thrower
programme.desc: Jackie, the pickle-throwing hooker, spends her twilight hours with the Reno Sheriff's Department.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: The Internet & Moment in the Life of Lil Jon
programme.desc: Dave walks in Lil Jon's shoes and considers the Internet's sleaziness.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: World Series of Dice & Mooney on Movies
programme.desc: The Marcy Projects hosts a champion shooter contest, and Paul Mooney talks "Gone with the Wind."

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: I Know Black People & Keeping It Real Goes Wrong
programme.desc: Dave asks contestants how much they know about black American culture.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Oprah's Baby Daddy & Jury Duty
programme.desc: Dave gets Oprah pregnant and recalls being a member of the O.J. Simpson trial jury.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Kneehigh Park & Making da Band
programme.desc: P. Diddy gives unusual requests, and Snoop Dogg visits Kneehigh Park; appearances by Q-Tip and Wyclef Jean.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Mandela Boot Camp & The Time Haters
programme.desc: Dave reveals sketches that are too hot for television.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Wayne Brady & Tyrone Biggums's Fear Factor
programme.desc: Dave gives up his show to Wayne Brady, and Tyrone Biggums returns as a guest on "Fear Factor."

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Lil Jon on Lil Jon & Black Bush
programme.desc: Dave considers how recent events would have played out if President Bush were black; special guests Jamie Foxx, Lil John, and music from Outkast's Big Boi.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: PopCopy & Clayton Bigsby
programme.desc: A blind white supremacist unleashes hate, and Dave unveils Nat King Cole's booty videos.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Tyrone Biggums at School & Wrap It Up Box
programme.desc: Crack addict Tyrone Biggums visits an elementary school.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Bubble Hat
programme.desc: Daniel takler hjernerystelse-striden, ønsker Amerika en forsinket gratulerer med dagen, og demonstrerer hvordan å grille på lavt budsjett.

programme.title: Tosh.0: 816
programme.desc: Daniel møter alle Bond-pikenes bestemor, finner en bedre bruk for plastflasker og gir ut den årlige Tosh.0 Body Issue.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Three Cheese
programme.desc: Daniel finner ut om en hard kropp har en myk side, beviser at andre kulturers bryllupstradisjoner er like fæle som amerikanske tradisjoner og avslører hvorfor han er den perfekte sengepartneren i nødssituasjoner.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Sex Doll Repairman
programme.desc: Daniel tar et langt skritt tilbake til da han brukte rød og svart tømmerhoggerjakke (med matchende lue) og introduserer en ny spesialstyrkeingeniør-kandidat til det republikanske partiet.

programme.title: Tosh.0: 819
programme.desc: Daniel forsøker å få visse av sine ansatte til å bli tøffinger og finner ut om det virkelig er kriminelt å stjele fra de døde.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Where Are They Now? Pt. 4
programme.desc: I sesongens siste episode før Daniel tar vårferie, får han undervisning i livet av en tysk party-prins, går inn på tv-spillmarkedet og tar farvel med tømmerhuggermoten.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Anesthesia Girl
programme.desc: I høstpremieren av 'Tosh.0' finner Daniel ut hvorfor anestesi og mobiler ikke er en god kombinasjon, reiser til Alabama, og deler sin DNA med resten av verden.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Randalin the PAWG
programme.desc: På neste Tosh.0 snakker Daniel med ei dame med stor rumpe, får sine ansatte til å si 'Huh, na na na na', og gir gode råd om å unngå fremmede.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Free Stud Service
programme.desc: Daniel swiper til høyre på nettets mest ettertraktede raring, skriver en liste over verdens verste byer, og setter sammen verdens verste antrekk.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Super Humman Stuntman
programme.desc: Daniel hopper til sengs med en ung stuntmann, får stabben sin til å spise usunn mat, og krever bakgrunnssjekker for å spille biljard.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline, who is trying to face single life bravely, tries her hand at an evening on the town alone, with a little coaching from Richard.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline supports Del in his efforts to expand business for her "Caroline in the City" cartoon strip and merchandise.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline's naive, helpful nature comes out in full bloom when she starts catering to her new elderly neighbor, Miriam, but Annie thinks Caroline is being taken advantage of.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline discovers that only one newspaper in the country has not renewed her cartoon strip, she obsesses on the matter until finally convincing herself to face the editors in person.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline has difficulty confronting her neglectful building superintendent, Mr. Tedescu about her faulty plumbing, so she hires a mediator to pressure Mr. Tedescu into taking care of her request.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Richard is stunned when his former love Julia informs him that she is about to be married.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: In the ongoing charade of Caroline pretending that she and Richard are married.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: A remorseful Caroline panics when she realizes that several hours have passed since she poured her heart out to Richard on his answering machine -- and she hasn't heard a response from him.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline realizes that the constant aching in her neck could be related to the stress she feels over her unresolved feelings toward Richard, but she doesn't let it get in the way of helping Richard navigate through troubled waters with Julia.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline feigns having read a writer’s novel to impress him, but their first date is a disaster as Caroline’s charade crumbles. Meanwhile, Richard jumps to Julia’s rescue when her waitress job at Remo’s leaves her customers hungry for attention.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Bobby and Tony’s friendship is on the line when they become embroiled in a hilarious love triangle and attempt to outdo each other in vying for the affection of a beautiful young lady.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The overweight blind date Alex once had returned to the scene a svelte shell of her former self, and eager for the romance she yearns for with Alex

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The riotous race of the century pits Alex against Louie in a winner-take-all bet to see who can bring in the most receipts. Lecherous Louie uses every dirty trick in the book to make sure he wins his prize—an evening with Elaine.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Elaine suddenly starts getting mysterious love letters. When she becomes intrigued by the poetic propositions, a couple of cabbies quickly claim responsibility, leaving Elaine with the hilarious task of discovering who is the amorous writer.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie makes a horrible first impression on girlfriend Zena’s parents on Taxi. Louie’s romance with girlfriend Zena takes an outrageous twist when she brings him home to meet her parents.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The cabbies try to make Tony a family man when they convince him to adopt the adorably precocious eight-year-old boy named Brian whom he befriended.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: It’s a hilarious shock to the cabbies when Rev. Jim brings his new pet to the garage—an over-the-hill racehorse that he bought after cashing in on the 300-to-1 long shot. However, he soon finds that it’s impossible to housebreak a horse.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Bobby faces a humorous predicament when it becomes obvious that one of the biggest talent managers in New York is representing him because of his prowess as a lover, and not for his ability as an actor.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: In a protest against unsafe equipment, the cabbies go on strike, and Louie offers an unusual solution to the problem to shop steward Elaine.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: One of John's patients, a high school student named Brad, comes in for a physical and John learns that the guy's sexually active, but isn't practicing safe sex. John performs an HIV test on Brad and tries to convince him to begin practicing safe sex.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John's at the end of his rope with his hectic practice and makes a call, which Linda overhears, telling the person on the other end that he can't take another day.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John helps his elderly neighbor, Mrs. Firth, get into her apartment and she repays him by making homemade chicken noodle soup.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Bob is distraught because a thirty-something guy at his gym died while on the treadmill, and he's certain that he's headed for the same fate.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: When a customer leaves the diner because of John's cigarette smoke, Chris puts her foot down and tells him that it is now a "smoke-free" restaurant.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John arrives at the diner and announces that he has quit smoking.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John walks into the diner and sees Chris, Bob, and Jake standing around a booth.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Chris' ex-husband, Roger, is in town and comes to the diner to see her.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: The fire marshal threatens to fine Chris for a faulty sprinkler system at the diner, but Chris flirts her way out of it.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John has a dream that he and Chris kissed each other. At the office, Linda is late and tells Margaret it's because her cab got hit by a runaway hotdog cart.
