programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Each team is asked to create two appetisers and an entrée for a US Marine's welcome home party. Ramsay boils over when one team sends out cold food during the dinner service.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The contestants must create a three-course meal with only 700 calories. Olympic athlete Annett Davis teaches the winning team how to play volleyball at the beach and a chef is taken to the emergency room.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The chefs roll dice to determine which ingredients they will use in a dish and one team continues to make the same mistakes while another gets tired of a bossy teammate.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The chefs compete in a blind taste-test challenge. One team serves raw meat and the other team runs out of potatoes.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: When both teams are asked to make crepes, the winning team spends the afternoon at a French restaurant; some chefs struggle with French cuisine.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Den siste av sitt slag, del 2
programme.desc: Når han oppdager at hans gode venner har blitt drept fordi de nektet å gi fra seg gården til eiendomsbaron Bedoe, blir Hayes Cooper med rangerne og går etter de som stod bak dødsfallene.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Vidunderbarn
programme.desc: Et ungt geni med psykokinesiske evner, som har blitt venner med Walker via nettet, ber om rangerens hjelp når han mistenker at moren, som er død ifølge hans foresatte, kanskje lever.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Rettferdighetens mann
programme.desc: Etter å ha bedt delstaten om ikke å avskrive en gruppe unge kriminelle, setter Walker i gang et intensivt og intenst seksukers-kurs for å prøve å rehabilitere forbryterne.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Regnbuens ende
programme.desc: Walker aner ugler i mosen når, bare timer etter å ha vunnet et løp, en prisvinnende hest, dens eier og trener blir funnet døde.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: En kvinnes plass
programme.desc: Mens hun jobber på byggeplassen hvor det bygges nye boliger for folk med lav inntekt, blir Alex' venn Alfre drapstruet når hun truer med å avsløre farlige brudd på bygningsforskriftene.

programme.title: MTV Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Rob Dyrdek styrer serien, som inneholder klipp fra nettet, samt har kjendisgjester og medprogramledere som Sterling «Steelo», Madison Beer og danske Nina Agdal. Nye episoder hver onsdag.

programme.title: Punk'd (MTV) NO: Taye Diggs, Rachael Leigh Cook, Halle Berry
programme.desc: Rachael Leigh Cook (She's all That) blows the whistle on an old man beat-down, Halle Berry (Gothika, Catwoman) is denied entrance into her own movie premiere and Taye Diggs (Brown Sugar) gets a touchy-feely examination from Dr. Punk'd.

programme.title: Punk'd (MTV) NO: Jaime Pressly, Blink 182 (Travis)
programme.desc: Travis Barker gets ready to throw down at dinner when his girlfriend's ex-boyfriend serves them up, Jaime Pressly, fashion entrepreneur or sweat shop slave driver and the Punk'd Foreign Press asks celebrities "important" questions on the red carpet.

programme.title: Punk'd (MTV) NO: Dave Mirra, OutKast, Amber Tamblyn
programme.desc: The Punk'd Feds get extreme on Dave Mirra (BMX pro), OutKast deals with the costs of a totaled luxury rental car and Amber Tamblyn (Joan of Arcadia) sits for a stranger's ooch and gets Punk'd doggie style.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chris Drama Pfaff
programme.desc: Robs fetter Drama hjelper til med å presentere ukens klipp, blant annet Family Dysfunction, Your Friend's a Dick, Little Rollers, bisarre Brazilian Lap Dance og uskyldige som får svi i Failure To Commit.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Judd Leffew
programme.desc: Okserytteren Judd Leffew lærer Chanel hvorvidt okser blir svimle, og Rob viser A Bunch of Bull og Angry Animals. Du får også se blant annet idiotkonkurransen Ridiculousness Decathlon.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Biker Fox
programme.desc: Caite Upton er tilbake, og Biker Fox slutter seg til panelet for litt spandexmoro i Biker Down. I Birds Are D**ks minner Rob oss på hvorfor fugler er idioter, før det hele avsluttes med velfortjent hevn i Animal Payback.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Ryan Dunn
programme.desc: TV-stjernen Ryan Dunn blir med på moroa, og Rob viser problemene med lavere utdanning i Lower Education. Du får også se blant annet Out of Your League, That's What You Get, Let Me Help You Hurt Yourself, og Accidental Filth.

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: Amber og Gary oppdager at det ikke er noe som heter ferie når man har baby. Maci krangler Ryan om hans nye kjæreste. Farrah har et følelsesladet møte med moren. Catelynn oppdager at Tyler fortsatt er sint på grunn av en gammel løgn.

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: Forholdet til Catelynn og Tyler er i trøbbel igjen da Catelynn røper en ny løgn. Gary kler seg ut som påskehare for Leah, men en krangel får Amber til å tvile på forlovelsen. Macis nye kjæreste møter Bentley, og Farrah blir svindlet.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Blues
programme.desc: Barney poses as a prospective rock-music recording artist to get evidence linking an organized crime figurehead played by guest star William Windom to the sudden death of a beautiful recording star who was being blackmailed by the syndicate.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Visitors
programme.desc: Guest star Steve Forrest plays the role of a millionaire publisher and communications tycoon who has sold fifty-one percent of his empire to an underworld crime syndicate which gives them a powerful influence over state politics.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Nerves
programme.desc: Christopher George guest stars in the role of a psychotic ex-convict determined to wreak vengeance on society.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Run for the Money
programme.desc: Guest stars Richard Jaeckel and Herbert Edelman play gangsters who try to get control of all the illegal betting parlors in the country as well as a virtual takeover of all thoroughbred horse racing.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Connection
programme.desc: Jim Phelps and his IMF team are given the assignment of breaking an underworld ring attempting to set up one of the world's largest drug manufacturing plants off the coast of Africa.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 603
programme.desc: I Ikast er Camilla og Marc sultne på et hus med plass til oppbevaring. Men når Tobias finner et stort hus til dem, mister de motet, da det nå er SÅ mange rom som må pusses opp...

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 604
programme.desc: Stine og Daniel lengter etter mer plass før de snart utvider familien fra tre til fire. Derfor er det ikke optimalt når Mads ringer og forteller at avtalen med det nye huset deres i Langå ikke gjelder.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 301
programme.desc: Astrid og Steffen skal kjøpe sitt første hus, men de kan ikke gå på kompromiss med ønskene sine. De møter programmets eksperter som skal kjøpe et hus på deres vegne.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 302
programme.desc: Louise og Michael har vokst ut av sin lille leilighet i Århus og trenger mer plass. Paret gjør et kompromiss, og Louise står overfor sitt største mareritt i huset som ekspertene kjøper til dem.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 303
programme.desc: Charlotte og Mikkel bor i en så liten leilighet at dusjen må tømmes for ting hver gang de skal bade. Men nå ønsker de å flytte litt ut av byen sammen med sønnen deres.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Dalsland
programme.desc: Tareq Taylor puts on his hiking boots and explores the pilgrim trail of Dalsland in West Sweden. This episode will include outdoor cooking, foraging and beaver safari.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Stockholm
programme.desc: When Tareq arrives in Stockholm he will meet innovation and world class gastronomy, a big city for foodies. He will make some pizza at the Rosendal garden café and go on an adventure in the archipielago.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Lolland
programme.desc: When Michelin star chefs move from Copenhagen to the countryside, they often end up in Lolland/Falster. Here Tareq will meet Claus Meyer the father of new nordic cuisine and other entrepreneurs that opened interesting restaurants here.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Skåne
programme.desc: Tareq Taylor explores his own backyard of Skåne and hometown of Malmö, a multi cultural food mix. Here you can find food and culture from all over the world that makes it a unique culinary destination.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Best Of
programme.desc: Tareq Taylor looks back on some of the food adventures he has been part of in the program series Nordic Cookery. Tareq promises delicacies from all over the Nordics and meetings with fantastic people along the way.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Läckö & Kinnekulle
programme.desc: By Lake Vänern you find Läckö and Kinnekulle, an area rich in history, culture and traditions. Tareq cooks exciting dishes on vendice roe, fish and local cheeses - all served on porcelain from the world-famous Rörstrand.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Sjuhärad
programme.desc: Sjuhärad is nature and culture in perfect symbiosis. Tareq takes the bike to meet some of the food entrepreneurs in the area who have started exciting new businesses. Here you live close to nature, forest and lakes.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Greater Copenhagen
programme.desc: Copenhagen and Skåne are a hot food destinations. Tareq visits Østergro, Denmark's first "rooftop farm" in the middle of Copenhagen, Eden in the new district Hyllie, Malmö and Häckeberga Castle where there will be wild boar for dinner.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Fight Night!
programme.desc: Nathan arrangerer en overraskelsesfest for sin singelbestevenn, Tahila. Aaron ringer huset og inviterer familien som støtte på hans første MMA-kamp i Newcastle. Alle stiller opp for Aaron, og familien drar i svært godt humør.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Meet The Newbies
programme.desc: Den nye Geordie Shore-serien begynner snart, men først har Scotty samlet det meste av gjengen for å prate om showet. Samt å treffe de siste fire tilskuddene, håndplukket av ham som folk som alle karakterene vil feste med.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Shake Ups & Break Ups!
programme.desc: Alt er ikke bra i Toon! Chloe og Sam har slått opp og gjengen er urolige for hvordan det kommer til å påvirke familien. James og Abbie er tilbake i huset, men første kveld slutter i katastrofe når Beau sier til Bethan at det er slutt.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Give It Another Go!
programme.desc: Sam forstår at han må sette seg og snakke igjennom tingene med Chloe, og forlater huset for en oppriktig og ærlig prat. Til slutt avgjør de å gi tingene en ny sjanse, men nyheten faller ikke bra ut hos resten av huset.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Tensions Keep Rising!
programme.desc: Chloe konfronterer jentene om at de ikke støtter henne i å gjenoppta forholdet med Sam. Sam gir Chloe en overraskelse, men oppførselen under guttekvelden fører til at de slår opp igjen! Abbie forteller James at hun så Chloe gå med en fyr på Ibiza.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Should We Just Break Up?
programme.desc: Ronnies drikking gir smertefulle bivirkninger. Snooki treffer en gutt som kanskje eller kanskje ikke er forlovet. Pauly slutter fred med en gammel fiende.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Cabs Are Here!
programme.desc: Ronnie og Sammis stormfulle forhold er over. Ronnie ødelegger alt Sammi eier, og hun må bestemme seg for om hun skal forlate gjengen.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: The Great Depression
programme.desc: Ronnie sliter etter at Sammi dro, og føler at han ikke har noen venner i huset. Jentene tar Sammis parti, guttene vet ikke hvordan de skal muntre ham opp. Mike legger an på Paulys ekskjæreste.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: After Hours 405
programme.desc: Følg Mike, Ronnie, Sammi, Vinny og Deena når de diskuterer starten på sesong fire - med all sin dramatikk og løsslupne humor. Få innsideinformasjon om Deenas ville sjekkinger og se gjengen gjenoppta krangelen som møtte veggen.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: After Hours 407
programme.desc: Det spisser seg til når Snooki, Jenni, Deena og Mike treffes for å diskutere Mikes påståtte beleiring av Snooki, for ikke å snakke om hva som skjedde mellom lakenene med Kjøttbollelaget.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: After Hours 409
programme.desc: Bli med Snooki, Jenni, Pauly og Vinni når de snakker om de overraskende ettervirkningene av Jionnis store krangel med Snooki. Og du får en smugkikk på det som kommer resten av sesongen.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Season 4 Reunion
programme.desc: Etter en sommer full av åpning og knusing av flasker, hjertesorg, 'lesbiotiske' kollisjoner og bilkollisjoner og drama som møter i veggen - gjenforenes gjengen for å åpne gamle sår og ta farvel med Firenze i dette eksplosive gjensynet.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Beggar's Comet
programme.desc: Not wanting to put the Tunnel World in further danger, Vincent decides to leave the tunnels and with the death of Snow, Gabriel plots for Vincent's demise.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: A Time to Heal
programme.desc: In the aftermath of the boat explosion that most likely killed Elliot, Diana is shocked when she encounters a wounded Vincent who collapses on Catherine's grave.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: The Chimes at Midnight
programme.desc: After Vincent entrusts Snow's ring to Diana, she quickly discovers Gabriel's henchman have targeted her and soon kidnap her and take her to Gabriel.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Invictus
programme.desc: With Vincent caged, Gabriel allows him to see his infant son who suddenly begins to make a miraculous recovery.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: In the Forests of the Night
programme.desc: Rolley is shot while trying to rob a liquor store and takes refuge in the tunnels.

programme.title: JAG: Dream Team
programme.desc: A sailor dies during a fight aboard a ship at sea; Bud discovers the explanation. Mattie wakes up and talks. The general announces a reorganization, orders, and a promotion.

programme.title: JAG: Pilot, Part 1 & 2
programme.desc: A woman radar-intercept officer (RIO) disappears at night from an aircraft carrier in the Adriatic Sea. Two JAG lawyers, Lt. Harm Rabb and Lt. Caitlin Pike, investigate and solve. Harm, a former Naval aviator, unexpectedly becomes a hero.

programme.title: JAG: Shadow
programme.desc: A civilian tech rep aboard a submarine seizes control of an experimental torpedo after its launch during an exercise

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Three Navy lieutenants die by homicide in 11 months around Washington. Harm and Meg investigate

programme.title: The Love Boat: Crew Confessions / Haven't I Seen You? / The Reunion
programme.desc: Isaac (Ted Lange) has trouble on the high seas when the Love Boat crew discovers he has included some racy tales about them in his new novel.

programme.title: The Love Boat: A New Woman / Trial Romance / Never Say Goodbye
programme.desc: In a poignant episode, Capt. Stubling (Gavin McLeod) is reunited with his love child, Vicki (Jill Whelan).

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Mallory Quest / The Offer / Julie, The Vamp - Part 1
programme.desc: The Love Boat sails on a fantastic voyage to the most exciting ports in the Caribbean with a famed mystery writer (Pernell Roberts) who is willing to pay $100,000 to one of his hand-picked guests to solve the mystery of his missing nephew.

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Mallory Quest / The Offer / Julie, The Vamp - Part 2
programme.desc: Julie is accused by a woman (Lani O'Grady) of stealing her fiance (Bart Braverman).

programme.title: The Love Boat: Tell Her She's Great / Matchmaker, Matchmaker Times Two / The Baby Alarm
programme.desc: Isaac causes comedic chaos when he convinces the crew to bolster his stagestruck aunt's (Isabel Sanford) ego, which turns her into an outrageous prima donna.

programme.title: Happy Days: Grandma Nussbaum
programme.desc: Grandma Nussbaum teaches Fonzie and Chachi a lesson in growing old gracefully when they try to convince the feisty granny to move into a retirement home.

programme.title: Happy Days: A Night at the Circus
programme.desc: Howard's teen-aged niece, K.C., comes to stay with the Cunninghams after a scandal closes her Houston boarding school while Fonzie hopes a night at the circus will help him win little Heather's heart when nothing else seems to work.

programme.title: Happy Days: Where the Guys Are
programme.desc: After tricking Fonzie into going to a single's camp to help him get over losing steady girlfriend Ashley, Potsie, Chachi and Roger get suckered into a sauna by three con-girls.

programme.title: Happy Days: You Get What You Pay For
programme.desc: Howard decides the house needs a second bathroom. Fonzie offers a way to have it installed and save Howard money as well.

programme.title: Happy Days: Kiss Me Teach
programme.desc: Joanie encounters trouble when she accepts a student teaching job at Patton High.

programme.title: Happy Days: The People vs. The Fonz
programme.desc: His friends are baffled when Fonzie refuses to speak in his own defense after he is accused of manhandling a student and brought before the school board's disciplinary court.

programme.title: Happy Days: School Dazed
programme.desc: Joanie tries to help an angry fifteen year old girl kick a drug habit that threatens to get her kicked out of school.

programme.title: Happy Days: Open House
programme.desc: Over the protests of Richie, whose parents are out of town, Potsie invites three-stranded beauty pageant contestants to spend the night.

programme.title: Happy Days: Richie's Car
programme.desc: Richie persuades his father to let him have his own car and Fonzie comes up with just the car for him, a hot rod named "Love Bandit," which turns out to be hot in more ways than one.

programme.title: MacGyver: To Be A Man
programme.desc: A seriously injured MacGyver finds himself in Soviet-dominated Afghanistan and befriended by a young Afghan boy.

programme.title: MacGyver: Ugly Duckling
programme.desc: MacGyver and a teenage computer whiz who has obtained information regarding top-secret defense technology try to stop a possible national catastrophe.

programme.title: MacGyver: Slow Death
programme.desc: MacGyver faces a bizarre and frightening challenge when revenge-seeking inhabitants of a desolate land take him and a trainload of fearful passengers hostage.

programme.title: MacGyver: The Escape
programme.desc: Kristina Wayborn,John DeLancie,Miguel Fernandez,Paul Verdier, Vic Polizos.

programme.title: MacGyver: A Prisoner Of Conscience
programme.desc: In one of his most exciting, suspenseful adventures, MacGyver infiltrates a Russian mental institution in order to save the life of a political prisoner.

programme.title: Matlock: The Nightmare
programme.desc: A vacation to a wild west ghost town becomes more than Matlock bargained for as a bump on the head takes him straight back in time to the real old wild west, surrounded by familiar faces – with very unfamiliar occupations.

programme.title: Matlock: The Marriage Counselor
programme.desc: Matlock’s dull, droning insurance broker, Allan Corning finds therapy for his struggling marriage interrupted by the sudden murder of his therapist, Dr. Harding Fletcher.

programme.title: Matlock: The Dame
programme.desc: When Matlock is slapped by an attractive older woman in a restaurant, Ben recalls to Julie the story of his first case – the murder of the man who put him through law school.

programme.title: Matlock: The Suspect (Part 1)
programme.desc: Matlock comes to the aid of a young socialite accused of murdering her older husband for money.

programme.title: Matlock: The Suspect (Part 2)
programme.desc: Matlock comes to the aid of a young socialite accused of murdering her older husband for money.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan and Steve investigate a private eye's murder in the not-very-pretty world of modeling.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A cardiologist and two business partners plot a deadly insurance scam.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A terrorist bombing ignites an undercover investigation involving an ambitious cop.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan finds a murder victim among the trauma patients from a major bus accident.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A senator's drug-addicted daughter is killed during an altercation with her father, but a senior aide covers up the incident as an overdose.

programme.desc: Vinny lider et ubeskrivelig tap, Angelina konfronterer Jenni om videoene, og romkameratene prøver seg på vintersport.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Guido Mania
programme.desc: Et hesteveddeløp gjør Deena forvirret, Angelina har en kjøttbolle-dag, og gutta får prøve fribryting, da de havner i ringen sammen med Jennis forlovede, som er profesjonell fribryter.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Guido Mania 2
programme.desc: Hvem vinner da Mike og Ronnie møtes i århundrets omkamp? Og hvem må betale da Jenni og Angelinas veddemål når sin slutning?

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Guidos On Ice
programme.desc: Jentene blir kjent med dama til Ronnie. Parene møtes i de første årlige Bae-lekene. Vinnys treffer en lenge savnet kjærlighet. En dag med familiemoro i Jersey Shore tar en ny vri når etterforskningen fortsetter.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Surprise! It's a Snooki
programme.desc: Mike tar etterforskningen til et nytt nivå og krever 'full avsløring'. En livlig diskusjon oppstår på do. Og Snooki drar til Poconos for å overraske Jwoww på fødselsdagen.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood se folk som snus opp ned av 'Påtvungne overslag', får seg en drink og to for mye med 'Pussa bestemødre' og finner ut grunnen til å unngå dansing med drinker i 'Ikke drikk og dans'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' med Rob, Steelo og Kristy Sarah får vi se strålende treffsikkerhet i 'Skallesnikskyting', finner ut av hva som er motsatt av å prestere under press i 'Vanære under press' og avslutter med noen 'Sjalu hjerter'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' drar Rob, Steelo og gjestevert Lolo Wood for å skate med gjenstander på hjul som er 'Park-uforenlig', tar bilder og får seg en smell i 'Knipseattakk' og holder fast på verdisakene i møte med 'Mobile skurker'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XXXV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' opplever Rob, Steelo og spesialgjest Lolo Wood at selv dommere kan oppleve stygge 'Dommertreff', at de kan bli fiskemat under 'Vannattakk og de hopper over instruksjoner i 'Anvisningskaos'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XXXVI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' tar Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood imot høyhastighetpresanger i 'Gaver i forbifarten', opplever massiv bråstopp i 'Løperhinder' og blir opprørt av 'Kritiske mødre'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XXXVII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' foretar Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood litt amatørmessig jordforflytning med 'Helgedosere', tar med ungene i butikken i 'Shoppingmonstere' og setter nesen sørover og opplever litt 'Landsens vrede'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XXXVIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' feirer Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood noen første smeller som ektepar med 'Første store feilsteg', prøver å kommunisere med berusede ved å 'Snakke fyllisk' og opplever fryktløse folk som er 'Slangesikre'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XXXIX
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' holder Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Lolo Wood hodet høyt for å unngå 'Baller fra oven', tar et lett kaotisk bad og opplever full 'Badekarinvasjon' og får hører den ufiltrerte sannheten av 'Søte små kritikere'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' morer Rob, Steelo og Carly Aquilino seg i parkeringsanlegg med 'Garasjegøy', ser at avløpsåpnere kan brukes til mer enn kun nummer to i 'Mangefasetterte avløpsåpnere' og lurer døden i 'Nesten knust'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Carly Aquilino XCII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og Carly Aquilino seg noen ordentlige 'Foreldreoverraskelser', ruller med noen skikkelig 'Dediserte inlineløpere' og mister litt kontroll i 'Radioustyrlige'.

programme.title: Andromeda: Bankene til Lethe
programme.desc: Et svart hull lar Dylan kommunisere med sin tidligere forlovede, 300 år tidligere.

programme.title: Andromeda: En rose i asken
programme.desc: Dylan er fengslet på en fengselsplanet og må utføre en flukt mens mannskapet hans prøver å redde dem.

programme.title: Andromeda: Alle store Neptuns hav
programme.desc: Castalian styrer Andromeda for å fullføre charteret for det nye samveldet. Når lederen blir oppdaget død, er Tyr hovedmistenkt.

programme.title: Andromeda: Perlene som var hans øyne
programme.desc: Beka får vite at farens tidligere forretningspartner handler med et svært vanedannende stoff som heter Flash.

programme.title: Andromeda: Tårenes matematikk
programme.desc: Andromeda oppdager søsterskipet, Pax Magellanic. Mannskapet ombord Pax er 300 år ... men har ikke blitt eldre en dag.

programme.title: Andromeda: Musikk fra en fjern tromme
programme.desc: Tyr krasjlander Eureka Maru på en Nietzschean-planet og utvikler hukommelsestap. Han må huske hva han gjør før Nietzscheans oppdager ham og hans kasse med stjålne varer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Dirty Deed
programme.desc: In this classic episode of Forensic Files, the longest-running true crime series in television history, Eileen and Derrick Severs disappear from their home in a small village in Great Britain and police find evidence of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer Fog
programme.desc: It was the single most deadly automobile accident in American history. Almost a hundred vehicles were involved, twelve people died and more than fifty people were injured. And it happened along a stretch of highway long known for dense, thick fog.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sex, Lies and DNA
programme.desc: While vacationing in California, Earl Morris learns that his wife has gone missing from their Arizona home. The search for Ruby Morris involves dozens of investigators and scientists — and even the Coast Guard.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Charred Remains
programme.desc: Shortly after daybreak, a fire is started in a dumpster in Vancouver. No one sees the arsonist or the fire, which burns for hours in the deserted parking lot. But there's more than garbage in this flaming container.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Postal Mortem
programme.desc: On October 15, 1985, two bomb explosions rocked Salt Lake City and resulted in two deaths. A third explosion occurred the next day; this time, the victim survived.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Micro-Clues
programme.desc: After a day of fishing in a quiet village in Switzerland, a teenage boy doesn't return home as planned. The investigation reveals some important microscopic evidence in the water near where he was last seen.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Common Thread
programme.desc: After 10 bodies turn up in Florida, one victim — 17-year-old Lisa McVey — is abducted but released. She leads police to the perpertrator, Bobbie Joe Long.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bitter Potion
programme.desc: Flu-like symptoms of a mother and her children prove to be something more serious: thallium poisoning. After the mother's death, investigators turn their attention to finding the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fatal Fungus
programme.desc: An infant is rushed to the emergency room with serious breathing problems. Within months, there are more than 30 similar cases. Can doctors find the cause and a cure?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Delivery
programme.desc: In this classic episode of Forensic Files, the longest-running true crime series in television history, a serial bomber targets a judge, two attorneys and even a courthouse.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 1
programme.desc: Unsolved Mysteries covers crimes, paranormal events, tales of lost love, UFO's, and unexplained history. This episode includes: Thumbs & Update, Marsh & Update, Conway, Honeymoon Bones and Dottie.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 2
programme.desc: Unsolved Mysteries covers crimes, paranormal events, tales of lost love, UFO's, and unexplained history. This episode: Badlands & Update, Sixty Miles, McFall and Mail Call & Update.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 3
programme.desc: Unsolved Mysteries covers crimes, paranormal events, tales of lost love, UFO's, and unexplained history. This Episode: Amnesia & Update, Carlucci & Update, Math Teacher Escape & Update and Beale's Cypher.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 4
programme.desc: This episode includes: Queen Mary Ghost Ship, Update: Carlucci, Two Strikes & UD and Personals Parts 1 & 2 & Update.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 5
programme.desc: This episode includes: D.B. Cooper Parts 1 & 2, Update: Math Teacher Escape, Friends to the End & Update and Babe's Uniform & Update.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 6
programme.desc: This episode includes: Son of Sam Pt. 1, Mystery Cowboy, Slain Swain & Update, and Update: Badlands.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Temple of Fear
programme.desc: In Miami, the discovery of a mutilated body sent investigators on the trail of a deadly cult. But agents found a wall of silence around the cult's members. Potential witnesses, terrified of reprisals, refused to talk.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Without Mercy
programme.desc: Despite what you see in the movies, most bank robbers come in quietly, pass a note, and slip away. They want cash, not bloodshed. But in Richmond, Virginia, a pair of gunmen entered a bank with their guns blazing.

programme.title: The FBI Files: No Remorse
programme.desc: A burning body in a dark alley shed light on a cold-blooded killer. His partners in crime would tell the story, if they lived. In the underworld of the drug trade, even a childhood friend can quickly become an enemy.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Hunter's Target
programme.desc: Over a thousand hunting accidents are reported in the United States each year. Fewer than ten percent of them are fatal. But when one hunter's death seemed suspicious, the FBI was called in to investigate.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Killing Spree
programme.desc: In 1984, in South Florida, a rapist and murderer was on the loose. The killer was a ruthless and terrifying predator, the newest member of an infamous group known as serial killers.

programme.title: The New Detectives: At Close Range
programme.desc: When a victim is gunned down at point-blank range, police often assume that a friend or acquaintance is to blame.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Stranger Than Fiction
programme.desc: A millionaire is found dead, murdered for a stash of buried silver. A young woman dates violent men, only to be killed by her best friend.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Collective Justice
programme.desc: Philadelphia's Vidocq Society, named after an 18th Century French detective, is one of the world's most unusual crime-solving organizations.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Without A Trace
programme.desc: Missing Person: Approximately 1.8 million Americans are reported missing each year. Worldwide, the number of missing persons nearly triples.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Forsaken Trust
programme.desc: When victims of murder know their killers, they are often caught off guard. But even the best-laid plans leave traces of the forsaken trust.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Lockdown: Family Full of Ghosts
programme.desc: The duo come into direct contact with spirits haunting the location. Even during the day there is no shortage of ghostly activity, on this lock down special paranormal Ghost Dimension investigation.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Lock Keepers Haunting at Lock 91
programme.desc: Sean heads to Manchester to investigate a lock keeper's cottage that was built in 1804. It appears that the spirits are still watching over the building and terrifying its customers.

programme.title: Past Hunters: Plas Teg
programme.desc: The county of Flintshire in Wales is said to be a land filled with ghosts and haunts. Plas Teg is said to be one of the "most haunted" houses in the area. With over 400 years of history, this place is sure to be the home of many an entity.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Lockdown: Halloween Special: Chillingham Castle
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension's Bex and Sean investigate Chillingham Castle for a Halloween investigation. The most haunted castle in the world. Reports of paranormal activity are daily here, so what will the team manage to capture tonight?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Washed Away Air Raid
programme.desc: This abandoned World War Two air raid shelter holds paranormal secrets that haunt anyone that ventures inside. A ghostly entity makes contacts they team uncover the whats behind the hauntings.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Did You Murder My Daughter?
programme.desc: Two years ago, Latisha and her boyfriend were found shot to death in their car. Latisha’s mother Nancy believes her ex-husband Kenneth was involved. Who is responsible for their deaths?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Got a 14 Year Old Pregnant
programme.desc: Megan is 14 and pregnant with 19 year old Michael’s baby, but he doesn’t see any problems with this situation. Laurie, Megan’s mother, turns to Steve to help get through to her!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve, Get Him Out!
programme.desc: Kelly’s ex-husband Nikki continues to haunt her. He went to jail for killing her 2 week old son and is now dating her 18 year old daughter! Can Steve get Nikki out of their lives forever?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: A Mother in Denial
programme.desc: When ordinary people need help, Steve Wilkos is ready to answer the call. Watch as Steve helps ordinary people stand up for themselves and fight for what he believes in order to promote justice for all.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: A Mother's Rage
programme.desc: Three years later, Elizabeth still carries strong doubts about Manny's intentions with her family and her husband Rodney is caught in the middle. Is Manny innocent?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Mommy Hurt Me
programme.desc: Stephanie’s drug addiction led her to neglect and abuse her kids. Scott’s fiancée stepped up as a mother and Stephanie failed multiple drug tests, he doesn’t want her near the kids, but wants her to atone for her wrongs!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Who’s Hurting My Granddaughter?
programme.desc: Maria claims that her son’s ex Amy and her new boyfriend Brian are abusing and neglecting her granddaughter. But Amy says Maria is a racist and angry over raising her grandchild in a Hispanic home!

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: I Now Pronounce You Dead
programme.desc: Mother of 3 Dianne Hood is shot to death by a masked gunman on her way home from a Lupus support meeting. Joe Kenda uncovers a sordid web of lust and greed, revealing a killer no one ever expected.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Death Rains Down
programme.desc: Restaurant worker Sharon Coleman is murdered in a hail of large caliber gunfire. Kenda must break through a web of lies to hunt down one of the most dangerous criminal masterminds he’s ever faced.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Fractured Glass
programme.desc: When affable ladies’ man Michael Tittemore is gunned down in the dead of night, Kenda first sets his sights on the roommates who were present during the murder.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: I Will Hunt You Down
programme.desc: When two escaped inmates surface in Colorado Springs, it’s up to Lt. Joe Kenda and his Fugitive Unit to bring them to justice.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Stuck In A Coffin
programme.desc: In the aftermath of a five-alarm fire, first responders discover a lifeless body. When Kenda learns that the deadly blaze was no accident, he launches a manhunt.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Highway
programme.desc: One is dead and two are in critical condition, and it’s up to Kenda and Barry to find out why a gun battle occurred in a quaint family home.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: An elderly woman is driving when she’s overcome with shooting pains and crashes her car. She’s rushed to the hospital, but the doctors find nothing wrong. Can Dr. G find the cause of death?

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: Police discover the dead body of Andrew Hopper clutching a syringe and covered with blood. The body is in Dr. G’s hands, as are the clues to solving the case.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: Dr. G must determine if a teen boy died by taking his own life, but the autopsy leads to a more shocking and tragic conclusion.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: A 71-year-old man wakes in the middle of the night, gasping for air. Paramedics rush to save him, but it’s all in vain: he’s dead by the time they arrive. What caused his death?

programme.title: The FBI Files: No Remorse
programme.desc: A burning body in a dark alley shed light on a cold-blooded killer. His partners in crime would tell the story, if they lived. In the underworld of the drug trade, even a childhood friend can quickly become an enemy.

programme.title: My Ghost Story: The Hand of Death
programme.desc: A cemetery that's home to 80,000 dead souls becomes a "ghost magnet"; a family discovers that their new home is filled with the sounds of strange footsteps and whispered conversations; and more.

programme.title: Death Walker with Nick Groff: Warwick Prison
programme.desc: Nick tries to contact the ghost of a serial killer who haunts buildings in the Warwick Prison complex.

programme.title: Death Walker with Nick Groff: Broadwell Funeral Home
programme.desc: Nick attempts to communicate with two men who died in the Broadwell Funeral Home in Ohio.

programme.title: Death Walker with Nick Groff: Old Williams County Jail
programme.desc: Nick investigates two infamous killers who may be responsible for haunting the Old Williams County Jail.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Sinister Happenings at The Village Farm Museum Part 1
programme.desc: The team heads to Lincolnshire to investigate the Village Farm Museum. This location looks out of place, being in the middle of a residential housing estate.

programme.title: Mutant X: Lest He Become
programme.desc: Shalimar godtar motvillig å kontakte sin fremmede far når teamet får vite at selskapet hans er involvert i gentesting og manipulering.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: The Executioner's Mask
programme.desc: Når ansiktet til en modell blir vansiret etter at hun tar på seg masken til en fransk bøddel, vil Sydney og Nigel prøve å finne graven for å snu forbannelsen.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: The Royal Ring
programme.desc: Når British Museum får Sidney og Nigel til å søke på Tudor-nettsteder etter en ring av kong Henry VIII, blir Nigel konfrontert med sin selvsikre pestende eldrebror Preston Bailey.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Set in Stone
programme.desc: I et kloster impalerer ridder Gabriel en demon, som deretter blir til stein. I 2001 ankommer Nigel og Sydney med et brev fra en munk, men abbeden hevder at det er forfalskning og stenger dem.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Deadline
programme.desc: Allan kommer til Sydney, han har 12 timer før et Necron-virus dreper ham med mindre han leverer Tau til en utpresser som har motgift.

programme.title: Andromeda: Hvis hjulet er løst
programme.desc: Beka og Tyr blir overtatt av energien fra en dimensjonal tunnel. Dylan, Trance og Harper må redde dem før de ødelegger skipet.

programme.title: Cops: Nightvision
programme.desc: A man on a late-night bike ride is stopped by officers for not having a headlamp. A suspect in a domestic dispute admits to hitting a woman.

programme.title: Cops: Now It's Lawn Furniture
programme.desc: A traffic stop over a broken brake light turns into a foot chase. A man handles bad news by throwing his furniture out of the window. A vehicle pursuit ends with a K-9 unit's help.

programme.title: Cops: Don't Make her Angry
programme.desc: A man needs police assistance when his angry ex-girlfriend crawls through his window. Police must play hide-and-seek when they attempt to execute an arrest warrant.

programme.title: Cops: And Through the Woods
programme.desc: Officers chase a fleeing suspect as he runs through the woods and into a rose bush. An elderly man puts himself in the middle of a knife fight.

programme.title: Cops: Fight and Flight
programme.desc: Police respond to a fight in progress call, officers tail a vehicle leaving a house known for drug activity, and a man calls the police after his wife pushes his Harley over.

programme.title: Cops: Who Let the Dogs Out?
programme.desc: Police find a burglary suspect up a tree in a California backyard, a parolee at large attempts to flee officers, and a man with a suspended license blows his second chance.

programme.title: Cops: Dead Man Flushing
programme.desc: Officers respond to a fight in progress involving mace at a minimart, and a woman tells police that her boyfriend threatened to flush her late husband's ashes down the drain.

programme.title: Cops: Pistol Packin' Families
programme.desc: A man riding a bike at night with no lights decides to take off rather than talk with police, and a dangerous domestic dispute unfolds on the streets of Texas.

programme.title: Cops: Grown Men Gone Wild
programme.desc: An officer pulls over a man making hand gestures at him while driving, an ex-Marine explains his side of a fight, and a traffic stop reveals a truck full of dogs and drugs.

programme.title: Cops: Kill 'Em With Kindness
programme.desc: Officers respond to a call that a man shot up his parents' house, a fleeing suspect hopes a change of clothes will fool the police, and a shaky hit-and-run story unravels.

programme.desc: On July 8, 2002, near Amiens, a farmer discovers the lifeless body of a young woman, Patricia Leclercq, on his field.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Shot In the While Sleeping (Richard Alessandri Case)
programme.desc: On the night of July 16, 2000, the life of Edwige Alessandri changed forever. She made a frantic emergency call in the town of Carpentras. She recounted that some men burst into her room and shot her husband while he slept.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Josiane Bézard Case
programme.desc: On the morning of January 9th 2014, Josiane Bézard, 53 years old, drives her son to the Manosque's train station, and then vanishes.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Julein Thevenet Case
programme.desc: On January 27th 2014, in Somme-Suippe in the Marne, Sophie Thevenet discovers her dead husband's body in the garage.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Raphael Lomoro Case
programme.desc: On June 12th 2007, in Berhen-lès-Forbach, in Moselle, a young woman reports the disappearance of her brother Raphaël Lomoro, 46 years old vanilla producer living in Madagascar.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 302
programme.desc: I september 2003 blir en gutt seksuelt misbrukt av en mann i trappeoppgangen der han bor. Politiet starter en intens jakt på mannens identitet for å få stoppet ham. Samtidig kommer det stadig inn nye meldinger om overgrep.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 402
programme.desc: En sommerdag i 1999 sykler tolv år gamle Kristin Juel Johannessen hjemmefra på vei til badestranda. Samme kveld blir hun meldt savnet. Hvor har den unge jenta tatt veien?

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 705
programme.desc: Psykolog Helena Bering forsvinner sporløst midt på dagen den 18. august 2004. Hun har nettopp avsluttet et møte med en klient på klinikken i Stockholm, når alle spor etter henne forsvinner.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 503
programme.desc: I 2007 kommer en mann og hans mor inn på politistasjonen i Bergen for å underrette om at hans kone, Dung Tran Larsen, har vært savnet i en uke. Hva skjedde egentlig med Dung?

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 303
programme.desc: Tidlig på 90-tallet rystes den norske befolkningen av flere kirkebranner. I 1993 blir Øystein Aarseth funnet død i en trappeoppgang i Oslo. Politiet retter søkelyset mot enkelte personer i black-metal-miljøet. En av disse er Varg Vikernes.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 401
programme.desc: I mai 1995 blir 17 år gamle Birgitte Tengs funnet drept bare noen få hundre meter unna sitt hjem i Kopervik på Karmøy. Saken fører til omfattende etterforskning, og Birgittes fetter havner raskt i søkelyset.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Gramma/Personal Demons/Cold Reading
programme.desc: A young boy cares for his grandmother, confronting fears to step up/A screenwriter with writer's block is haunted by unseen creatures/Actors in a radio play realize their words manifest reality.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Wordplay/Dreams For Sale/Chameleon
programme.desc: A salesman stunned as others speak jumbled English/A woman's picnic fantasy shattered/A shuttle returns with an unusual find.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Walking Distance
programme.desc: Martin Sloan, driving through the country, leaves his car and starts to walk toward his hometown, Homewood. He finds things exactly as they were when he was a child. He soon realizes he's gone back in time.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Escape Clause
programme.desc: A hypochondriac exchanges his soul for immortality and indestructibility.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Lonely

programme.title: World War II in HD Colour: Britain at Bay
programme.desc: Germany makes critical errors during the bombing of Britain.

programme.title: World War II in HD Colour: Victory in Europe
programme.desc: In 1945, Germany is crumbly on both fronts. The Western Allies cross the Rhine and take most of Germany, while the Red Army quickly advances into Berlin. After Hitler's suicide, Germany surrenders and is divided among the allied powers.

programme.title: The Rise of the Nazi Party: Becoming Respectable
programme.desc: In 1924, Hitler is convicted for High Treason after the failed Nazi power grab. In prison, he writes Mein Kampf, articulating his anti-Semitic and expansionist beliefs. Upon release, Hitler rebrands the Nazi Party.

programme.title: The Real Oppenheimer
programme.desc: I 1945 ble verden ført inn i atomalderen. Rollen hans som "Father of the Bomb" var satt , og Oppenheimer ble stadig mer bekymret for den potensielle faren denne vitenskapelige oppfinnelser kunne utgjøre for menneskeheten.

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: The Jews Who Fought for Hitler
programme.desc: In Hitler’s Germany, those with Jewish ancestry faced harsh Nuremberg Laws. Full Jews faced death; Mischlinge endured discrimination, job bans. Some, like Helmut Schmidt, unaware of heritage, found protectors like Milch in high places.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: iCarly: Kysset
programme.desc: Sam overhører Freddie fortelle Carly at han aldri har kysset en jente, og avslører hemmeligheten hans på netshowet. Gibby og Carly trener Spencer til utttaket for det lokale, profesjonelle fotballaget.

programme.title: iCarly: Bilbråk
programme.desc: Gjengen holder en konkurranse på iCarly, og premien er en ny bil fra en lokal forhandler. Etter at Nevel vinner, oppdager barna at forhandleren ikke visste noe om konkurransen eller bilen de skulle ha donert bort som premie.

programme.title: iCarly: Fred
programme.desc: Freddie sier offentlig at han ikke er fan av internettsensasjonen Fred, noe som får Fred til å meddele at han skal slutte å legge ut filmer for alltid. Fansen blir rasende fordi Freddie har forårsaket slutten på de populære filmene.

programme.title: iCarly: Dobbelt opp
programme.desc: Når Carly, Sam og Freddie sniker seg ut for å dra til en MMA-kamp, får de sine dobbeltgjengere til å lure Spencer til å tro at de fortsatt er hjemme. Imens bygger Spencer en kjempeversjon av Newton Balls.

programme.title: iCarly: Om hva for noe?
programme.desc: Når Carly, Sam og Freddie oppfordrer iCarly-fans til å stemme på David Archuleta i "Amerika Sings", syns de synd på nummer to og hjelper ham med å lage en musikkvideo.

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg skal gjøre Sam jentete
programme.desc: Da Sam innrømmer at hun liker en gutt på skolen, lærer Carly henne hvordan hun kan lokke ham til seg ved å oppføre seg mere feminint. Spencer er overbevist om at en jente liker ham pga. smokingen hans, så han går med den hele tiden.

programme.title: iCarly: A date en pøbel del 1
programme.desc: Når Carly dater er en tøffing, prøver hun å holde forholdet skjult for Spencer. Og Sam betaler Freddie for å lage en hjemmeside der hun kan legge ut alle sine ekle videofavoritter.

programme.title: iCarly: Gjenforening med Missy
programme.desc: Da Carlys gamle venninne Missy flytter tilbake til Seattle, tror Sam at Missy prøver å skifte henne ut som Carlys bestevenninne.

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg må ha skap 239
programme.desc: Når Sam og Freddie begge to vinner konkurransen for skolens beste skap, slir de nødt til å dele skap. Carly ber Spencer gi henne timer i billedkunst.

programme.title: iCarly: iCarly utdelingen
programme.desc: Carly, Sam og Freddie holder en iCarly-galla for de beste bruker-bidragene i iCarly, og hyller pristagerne live på web-showet. Spencer verver europeiske badedraktmodeller for å hjelpe ham å lage premiestatuettene.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Rebound: Part 1
programme.desc: I kjølvannet av den eksplosive separasjonen, har Sam falt av vognen og gått tilbake til playboy-livet, mens Diane nettopp har kommet tilbake fra en selvpålagt hvile på Golden Brook Sanitarium.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Rebound: Part 2
programme.desc: Etter flere økter med Dr. Frasier Crane, får Sam livet i orden igjen. Diane føler at det er på tide å fortelle ham sannheten om forholdet med psykiateren.

programme.title: Cheers NO: I Call Your Name
programme.desc: Sam fryder seg når han får grunn til å tro at Diane fremdeles er forelsket i ham.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Fairy Tales Can Come True
programme.desc: Frasier ber Sam om å ta med Diane til et arrangement mens han er borte fra byen.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Sam Turns the Other Cheek
programme.desc: Sam høster konsekvensene av å bli involvert med en gift kvinne.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Coach in Love: Part 1
programme.desc: Coach foreslår ekteskap når han forelsker seg ved første blikk.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Coach in Love: Part 2
programme.desc: Sam og Diane prøver å få Coach til legge vekk gifteplanene.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Diane Meets Mom
programme.desc: Moren til Frasier truer Diane på livet når de møtes for første gang.

programme.title: Cheers NO: An American Family
programme.desc: Carlas eksmann kommer tilbake med sin nye brud og krever omsorgen for deres eldste sønn. Den normalt sprø Carla sjokkerer alle i baren når hun godtar forespørselen.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Ding-Dong-Ditch / Head lice / Nothing happening
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-Head have trouble with a prank / The duo try to cure their scratchy heads / A quiet day in Highland, Texas

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Cyber-Butt / Citizens arrest / Pierced
programme.desc: The school PC gets internet and Stewart helps out friends surf the net / An armed robbery has hilarious consequence / Beavis and Butt-Head get beaten up and inspired to get their ears pierced

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Bus trip / Green thumbs
programme.desc: The class goes on a roadtrip / Beavis and Butt dabble into counterfeit money using a photocopier

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Meet God
programme.desc: Innocent, naive yougsters Beavis & Butt-head are drawn into an insidious religious cult.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: 1-900-BEAVIS / Water Safety
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head try to start their own phone service / Beavis and Butt-head learn CPR from Mr. Buzzcut

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Friday Night / Tornado
programme.desc: Beavis & Butt-head spend Friday night at the local convenience store. / Beavis & Butt-head in their own mini-disaster movie with new friends Lolita and Tanqueray.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: They're Coming to Take Me Away, Huh Huh (aka Psychiatrist)/ Jump!
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head pass all their Rorscach tests. / Beavis and Butt-head inadvertently stop a suicide.

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Den nye fienden / Dobbelgjengeren
programme.desc: Vaskebjørner stjeler Beavis og Butt-Heads nachos, og guttene slår tilbake./ Beavis forveksler en fremmed med Butthead, og kan ikke bli kvitt ham.

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Bokset inne / Birøktere
programme.desc: Beavis og Butt-Head fanges i en pappeske mens de prøver å gjemme seg på skolen./ Beavis og Butt-Head prøver å sanke honning fra et vepsebol.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Leave it to Beavis/ Butt Flambé / Crying / Doomsday
programme.desc: The show parodies Leave It to Beaver / The duo needs to go to a hospital / Beavis cries and is mocked unrelentlessly / Highland experiences a toxic gas leak

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sabrina’s Date with Destiny
programme.desc: Sabrina and her friends return to school and a lot of excitement after summer break.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: What’s News?
programme.desc: Josh lands a job as a photojournalist for the Boston Citizen, and is surprised to learn that Sabrina is a fan of his new boss, Mike Shelby.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Murder on the Halloween Express
programme.desc: Hilda and Zelda are invited to attend a murder mystery party on the Halloween Mystery Train, which makes a stop in Boston.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The Gift of Gab
programme.desc: Sabrina and Roxie are thrilled to get their own show on the campus radio station, a two hour talk show they call "Chick Chat."

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Thin Ice
programme.desc: Sabrina finds herself in a jam when ex-boyfriend Harvey requests that she use her magical powers to help him.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Hex, Lies, and No Videotape
programme.desc: Josh gets Sabrina an internship at the Boston Citizen where he works.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Humble Pie
programme.desc: Sabrina and her roommates discover that Morgan didn't pay her portion of the rent when the housing office sends a student to replace her in the house.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: A Birthday Witch
programme.desc: Sabrina receives an unexpected surprise on her birthday, a visit from her evil Aunt Irms, the matriarch of the Spellman family.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Deliver Us from Email
programme.desc: Intern Sabrina wants to propose writing her own column about the college experience to Boston Citizen editor Mike Shelby.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Cloud Ten
programme.desc: In an attempt to escape her problems, Sabrina decides to visit her childhood friend, Cathy Winter (Colleen Ann Fitzpatrick) in the Other Realm.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sabrina and the Candidate
programme.desc: Sabrina is assigned to research the local city councilman election for an article, which will run in the Boston Citizen.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Battle of the Sexes: Part 2
programme.desc: The Keatons reminisce about their relationships gone awry.

programme.title: Fem i familien: High School Confidential
programme.desc: Alex tutors Nick to help him earn his high school diploma.

programme.title: Fem i familien: My Mother, My Friend
programme.desc: Mallory gets jealous when her friend forms a bond with Elyse.

programme.title: Fem i familien: A Tale of Two Cities: Part 1
programme.desc: Alex accompanies his boss on a business trip to Chicago.

programme.title: Fem i familien: A Tale of Two Cities: Part 2
programme.desc: Alex’s boss makes a pass at him while on a business trip in Chicago.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Higher Love
programme.desc: Mallory joins a poetry club and falls for the leader of the group.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Architect's Apprentice
programme.desc: Nick competes in a local art competition at Steven’s station.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Band on the Run
programme.desc: Alex is unsuccessful at managing Jennifer’s all-girl band.

programme.title: Fem i familien: A, My Name Is Alex:Part 1
programme.desc: Alex questions the meaning of life when his friend dies in a car accident.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Bone Thugs And Homeless
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer en hund som plager en nyhetsreporter og Harriet Tubman som løper fritt omkring.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Landlord
programme.desc: I sesongfinalen vil president Obama behandles som alle andre, Jordan ser på en leilighet som er eid av en mistenksom utleier, og et par festfiksere som vil få gang i festen på en bar mitzvah.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Hollywood Sequel Doctor
programme.desc: Kileleking mellem to venner blir plutselig merkelig, forfattere brainstormer til 'Gremlins 2', to bøller mistenker vennen sin for å stjele og Keegan og Jordan diskuterer Afrika på en fest.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Biological Dad
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer et romvesen som lærer om kvinnelig anatomi, karer som prøver å overgå hverandre og møtet mellom de to siste mennesker på Jorden.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Y'all Ready For This?
programme.desc: Et fotballag girer seg opp før en kamp, president Obama og Luther møter Hillary Clinton, to karer forbereder seg på potensielle trusler på et fly, pirater synger en sang og en betjent er litt for skyteglad.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Manly Tears
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer en narkohandel som går på trynet, en mafiafyr som er en stor grinasabb, og Darius Rucker som prøver å takle sin Hootie-fortid.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Michael Jackson Halloween
programme.desc: Jordan og Keegan feirer Halloween med å flykte fra rasistiske zombier, skuespillerne i 'Human Centipede' har en skremmende gjenforening, og vi besøker en folkeskole for trollmenn med problemer.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Killer Concept Album
programme.desc: En politiker benekter å ha sendt rampete bilder, en detektiv forhører en rapper, Cedric og Levi finner lyn i en flaske, to herrer fra sør komplimenterer kvinner, Jordan møter en gammel venn og en betjent tar tingene helt bokstavelig.

programme.title: Key & Peele: East West Bowl #2
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer en introdukjson av de nyeste East/West Bowl-spillerne, utleier-Devon ransaker Jordans leilighet, og Jordan blir støtt av en overseksuell kollega.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Sex Detective
programme.desc: En respektert kriminalbetjent, ekspert i sexforbrytelser, benytter ukonvensjonelle metoder for å løse en sak, en actionhelt redder kjæresten sin og en ansatt i en butikk med yoghurt-is tester for mange vareprøver.

programme.title: Key & Peele: I'm Retired
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer en ungkars-fest som blir underlig og en svart fyr med en hvit penis.

programme.title: Broad City: Just the Tips
programme.desc: Ilana går amok med pengene hun tjente på servitørjobben, og Abbis nye forhold gjør at det lyser av henne. På fest senere den kvelden, møter jentene på en gammel venn.

programme.title: Broad City: Mushrooms
programme.desc: Abbi og Ilana ruser seg på sopp og opplever en hendelsesrik trip.

programme.title: Broad City: Abbi's Mom
programme.desc: Abbis mor kommer til byen på besøk, og Ilana navigerer Sushi Mambeaux' intense arbeidskultur samtidig som hun håndterer sin sesongavhengig depresjon.

programme.title: Broad City: Witches
programme.desc: Abbi føler seg gammel etter å ha funnet et grått hår; Ilana går til en sexterapeut.

programme.title: Broad City: Florida
programme.desc: Abbi, Ilana, Eliot og Bobbi drar til Florida for å rydde ut av Grandma Esthers leilighet.

programme.title: Broad City: House Sitting
programme.desc: Abbi, Ilana, Jaime og Lincoln passer huset til Strands. Ilana og Lincoln definerer forholdet deres, og Abbi går på en Bumble-date med en mann fra fortiden hennes.

programme.title: Broad City: Bed Bugs
programme.desc: En fancy ny veske gir Abbi tillit under arbeidsledigheten. Ilana og Jaimé må ta tak i et uunngåelig New York City-mareritt.

programme.title: Broad City: Friendiversary
programme.desc: Jentenes 'Friendiversary' utvikler seg i en farlig retning når de blir vitne til noe forferdelig.

programme.title: Broad City: Stories
programme.desc: Abbi og Ilana farer fra toppen av Manhattan til bunnen for å feire Abbis 30-årsdag, og treffer på både gamle og nye venner på veien.

programme.title: Broad City: Shework and S**t Bucket
programme.desc: Ilana gir seg i kast med sin seneste mulighet til å tjene penger da hun en åpner et utendørs kontorlandskap for New Yorks røykere; Abbi konfronterer husverten sin da han nekter å modernisere sanitæranlegget hennes.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Death of a Pickle-Thrower
programme.desc: Jackie, the pickle-throwing hooker, spends her twilight hours with the Reno Sheriff's Department.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Baghdad 911
programme.desc: Iraqi police force cadets learn law enforcement skills from Reno's finest, and Dangle and Wiegel destroy a huge cocaine supply.

programme.title: RENO 911!: The Tanning Booth Incident
programme.desc: Dangle learns that free tanning sessions for law enforcement aren't necessarily a good thing.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Strong Sister
programme.desc: Strong Sister magazine visits the station for an in-depth profile on Williams, and the deputies enforce Reno's six-foot rule for lap dances.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Wiegel's Dad Returns
programme.desc: While the deputies investigate Reno's Thai sex trade, Wiegel's long-lost father returns to reconnect with his daughter.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Junior Runs for Office
programme.desc: Junior finds a job he really wants: commissioner for animal carcass removal.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Undercover Acting Coach
programme.desc: Sergeant Clift, the LAPD's undercover acting coach, teaches the deputies the subtle art of theater.

programme.title: RENO 911!: The Parade
programme.desc: The Carson City Parade Float Contest brings out the deputies' competitive spirit.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Training Day
programme.desc: Jones adjusts to his new partner's unorthodox style, and Wiegel and Williams enjoy some surprisingly delicious racist wines.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Extradition to Thailand!
programme.desc: Junior and Jones reap the benefits that come from extraditing a murderer, and Dangle and Rizzo receive a surprise crash course in surgery.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Tyrone Biggums at School & Wrap It Up Box
programme.desc: Crack addict Tyrone Biggums visits an elementary school.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Zapped & It's a Wonderful Chest
programme.desc: Dave screens his failed reality TV show and shares outtakes from "Roots."

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Reparations & NY Boobs
programme.desc: Great New York boobs get awards, and Dave predicts reparations chaos.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Great Moments in Hookup History & Ask a Black Dude
programme.desc: With time running out, Martin Johnson has one last stab at glory: Ashley "Smashly" Evans.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Mad Real World & Ask a Gay Dude
programme.desc: Dave imagines a "Real World" season with an all-black cast and one super-white guy.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Real Movies & Wu-Tang Financial
programme.desc: Dave takes a realistic look at "Pretty Woman" and "The Matrix" and introduces the Wu-Tang Clan's new financial consulting firm.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Tyrone Biggums's Intervention & Racist Hollywood Animals
programme.desc: Tyrone mistakes an intervention for a crack sale, and "Frontline" covers racist animals.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Blackzilla & Playa Haters' Ball
programme.desc: Dave takes Japan by storm in the sci-fi adventure "Blackzilla," and America Undercover presents The Playa Haters' Ball.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Piss on You & The World's Greatest Wars
programme.desc: Dave presents the History Channel coverage of great inner-city gang wars from the 1980s.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Make-A-Wish & Fisticuff
programme.desc: Dave sees people's inner thoughts and freaks out when a little kid beats him at video games.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: O'Dweeds & Trading Spouses
programme.desc: Dave shows what happens when couples try "Trading Spouses" and introduces a family-friendly brand of pot; musical guest Black Star.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Super Humman Stuntman
programme.desc: Daniel hopper til sengs med en ung stuntmann, får stabben sin til å spise usunn mat, og krever bakgrunnssjekker for å spille biljard.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Food Surgeon
programme.desc: Daniel innkaller 'The Candyman' og setter en stopper for den nifse klovnekrisen.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Bong Lord
programme.desc: Daniel blir heit i toppen med Bongenes Herre, beviser at ingen betaler mer for motbydelig innhold enn han gjør og bringer fred til Midt-setet.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Tosh.0lection Special
programme.desc: Som den med minst fordommer på kabel-tv, hengir Daniel seg til å bringe folk sammen for å le av 2016-valget.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Makeup Jake
programme.desc: Daniel får ansiktsbehandling av en vakker gutt, trykker på pause på den nyeste, teite internett-utfordringen og blir bibelsk med ukens fan.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Kate's Food Challenge
programme.desc: Daniel går i samtale med en vakker engelsk Beefeater, finner sin internett-tvilling og prøver å klemme seg vei inn i rekordbøkene.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Season 8 Highlights
programme.desc: Daniel feirer Jesu fødsel, blokkerer sine mest irriterende

programme.title: Tosh.0: Nut Shot Zach
programme.desc: Daniel viser frem sine mest flekkutsatte klær, tuller med en fyr som burde arresteres for testikkelmord, og egger fansen til å plage en tv-selskapssjef.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Drone Wife Cheat
programme.desc: Daniel feirer Valentinsdagen med dronepiloten som avslørte sin utro kone, får presseakkreditering av Det hvite hus, og viser at moderne svart historie er minst like viktig.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Blind Film Critic
programme.desc: Daniel inviterer en blind filmkritiker med på sin Oscar-fest, besøker hotellbasseng-hoppets falne helt, og introduserer en trudelutt som vil få dere til å trampe takten.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline feigns having read a writer’s novel to impress him, but their first date is a disaster as Caroline’s charade crumbles. Meanwhile, Richard jumps to Julia’s rescue when her waitress job at Remo’s leaves her customers hungry for attention.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline discovers that she’s been receiving free cable, her honesty with the cable company gets her into deep trouble with her not-so-truthful neighbors.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Annie is visited by her old singing teacher, Miss McGowan, Caroline helps Annie pretend to still have her “Cats” role, an act that may have a surprise ending.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: It’s a game of messy politics when Caroline will not endorse a local councilman, who is inspired by her comic strip, while Del conjures up a promotional campaign.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Discreetly planning to ease Caroline’s homesick holiday blues, Richard (Malcolm Gets) goes to great lengths to get a gift for Caroline that inspires suspicion in Julia (Sofia Milos) and sleuthing from Caroline and Annie.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Informed by Annie (Amy Pietz) of Caroline’s (LeaThompson) unspoken love for him, Richard (Malcolm Gets) confronts Caroline, who tells him that it’s a thing of the past.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline (Lea Thompson) is tapped as a celebrity guest star for a quiz show, her jitters prompt Richard (Malcolm Gets) to help her study, much to Julia’s (Sofia Milos) chagrin.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline (Lea Thompson) tries to convince an insecure Del(Eric Lutes) that he has the potential to be a great parent after Del is shocked to discover that he is the father of a 10-year old girl.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Julia (Sofia Milos) tells Caroline (Lea Thompson) that it’s not easy being on the outside of her close working relationship with Richard (Malcolm Gets), Caroline quickly, and mysteriously, learns what it’s like to walk a mile in Julia’s shoes.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: As Caroline (Lea Thompson) struggles with commitment issues over Trevor, Richard(Malcolm Gets) inadvertently causes a rift between Caroline and her new beau.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: In a protest against unsafe equipment, the cabbies go on strike, and Louie offers an unusual solution to the problem to shop steward Elaine.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: In a hilarious caper, Louie and the cabbies pool all their cash to buy a painting at an auction, planning to cash in big when the artist dies—but when the bidding gets too heavy, the gang turns a dignified auction into a frolicking free-for-all.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Lecherous Louie, the dispatcher, becomes a lovesick pup after his girlfriend finds another guy. He will stop at nothing to get her back, including recruiting Alex for his hilarious scheme—and the riotous shenanigans at the Sunshine Cab Co. never stop.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: It’s a riotous family reunion when Jim returns home to face his millionaire dad for the first time since he dropped out of society in the ‘60s, and Alex has his hands full with Jim’s voluptuous, overly amorous sister,

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The Taxi gang falls prey to hilarious fear for homeless Elaine’s romantic well-being when chivalrous Bobby allows her to live in his apartment while he is gone. Unexpectedly, he returns before she has found other quarters

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Hilarious sparks fly when Tony tries to fix up his divorced sister with Alex. Instead, she ends up falling for Reverend Jim and Tony goes outrageously overboard trying to break up the affair.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Lecherous Louie the dispatcher has the dubious honor of being selected by his employer’s revenge-seeking wife to be her clandestine lover, and comedic panic grips the love lair when the boss shows up unexpectedly.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Wild and crazy theatrics erupt when Tony decides to become an actor and Bobby, as his skeptical agent, is aghast when Tony lands a role because he is the right type.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Bobby’s vicious letter to a hated critic is salvaged from the wastebasket and sent to the newspaper by a gleeful Louie, setting the stage for a wild and comical night when the critic, and the cabbies, decide to take in Bobby’s one-man play.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John has a dream that he and Chris kissed each other. At the office, Linda is late and tells Margaret it's because her cab got hit by a runaway hotdog cart.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Highlights from last season include Chris and John exchanging "I love yous" as Chris is wheeled into surgery for an appendectomy.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: At the diner, Jake bemoans his poor financial status, and Hector proposes that he participates in a drug-testing program to earn money.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Chris and John have their first impromptu date, but Chris wants something more formal before taking the relationship any further, and tells John so.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John takes Chris out for their first official date - to a cheap Chinese restaurant. both are excited about the possibility of their "first time."

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: As John and Chris get more serious in their relationship, Chris realizes that John is not as affectionate as she'd like him to be.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: It's Thanksgiving and Chris wants to make dinner for John, who is totally against holidays.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: At the diner, Hector tries to talk Jake into giving him money to invest in coffee futures, but Jake resists.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: At the diner, Jake receives a letter and is shocked to find out that his late grandmother has left him $25,000.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Margaret tells John that a letter for a medical conference has arrived, but John scoffs, saying it's just an excuse for doctors to have a weekend in Las Vegas.
